naree-authentic-thai-massage.text: Very impressive experience. Did a 60 min sports massage and felt like a new person afterwards! Clean, professional and the therapist was phenomenal.

sawasdee-thai-spa.author: Karen Rademeyer
sawasdee-thai-spa.text: I've travelled to Thailand several times and the massages at Sawasdee are incredible, right up there in technique and effectiveness. Exceptional massages. Highly recommend it. I'll definitely be back.

sawasdee-thai-spa.author: Mashaba Digojane
sawasdee-thai-spa.text: What an amazing visit was at Sawasdee Thai Spa. As much as I like and enjoy working from home and will never trade it for anything, it come with its challenges. We always overwork ourselves and sometimes forget to take decent leg stretch time and that’s where Sawasdee Thai Spa is coming.

sawasdee-thai-spa.author: Lee
sawasdee-thai-spa.text: The best Thai spa in Cape Town and I would always recommend them, professional, clean and always accommodating. Keep up the good work ladies💪🏽

toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.author: Toni Cooke
toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.text: Fun was had by young and old. On entering the premises, the guards assisted with parking & was friendly & helpful. The property & landscape is stunning, well manicured & cared for. The staff is friendly & patient & explained the handling of the carts very well. Although we didn't stay to eat, the restaurant looked very appealing.

toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.author: Darren Pillay
toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.text: Very nice place, they give you a free ride on you birthday , make sure you carry you Id. Or birth cert with . Ride costs r100 for a single ride , with various packages available, I think it's Abit pricey , but good fun 😎

toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.author: Zarier Chothia
toboggan-family-park-pty-ltd-t-a-cool-ru.text: What an adrenaline rush. Might look slow and steady but once you on the toboggan it a completely different sense of feelings. The ride up is beautiful and relaxing, but once you got the start point there's no going back. It's all downhill from there. Rushing down the slope you feel the air and speed. Differently worth going there.

ster-kinekor-cape-gate.author: Dianne Le Grange
ster-kinekor-cape-gate.text: I went to see a movie at ster kinekor cape gate today as tygervalley movie house is under renovations. It was my first time at at cape gate movie house as I normally go to tygervalley. I had such a good experience. Zintle was so friendly and helpful and assisted me in booking my ticket .

ster-kinekor-cape-gate.author: Divan Lourens
ster-kinekor-cape-gate.text: Nothing beats the imax experience top quality viewing and top quality sound. The normal cinemas can up their game sound quality wise. Further on not bad at all

ster-kinekor-cape-gate.author: CEDRIC DE WET
ster-kinekor-cape-gate.text: Awesome IMAX experience for Michael. Just a pity we had to stand in line for 27 minutes for snacks because 3 out of 9 stations were manned.

ipic-play.author: Patrick VDV
ipic-play.text: The atmosphere is always fantastic. The food is genuinely amazing, and the staff are some of the friendliest and most professional people you’ll ever meet. What’s really impressive is how they are constantly looking for ways to improve and innovate.

ipic-play.author: Natasha
ipic-play.text: We decided last minute to take our 2 year old to play. Service was great when we paid to enter, there is a hole host of activities for all ages. Starting with the 0-2 year old area which has a merrygoround, mini trampoline and carousel with number blocks and lots more.

ipic-play.author: Lise Pienaar
ipic-play.text: We took our son here yesterday. He had a blast. Lost different play areas for all ages. Even upper climbing gear for bigger kids and wall climbing. There are staff at all the play areas making sure everyone is safe. They also have a cafe with drinks and many different food options. Will definitely come visit again.

playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.author: Dieter Wagener
playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.text: I’m really disappointed with our experience at Playalot Durbanville. Firstly, the place was extremely dirty. The seating and eating areas clearly aren’t cleaned properly, which is very unpleasant when you’re there with children.

playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.author: Carey Boshoff
playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.text: What made this place stand out to me wasn't the play areas/activities, nor the food, what won my heart and makes me know I'll be back are the absolutely standout staff. Each and every interaction we had was beyond the norm. Most play areas staff are good but apathetic to kids, in my experience, which I understand.

playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.author: Lynelle Poole
playalot-indoor-adventure-park-pinehurst.text: I want to take a moment to sincerely thank the entire team at Playalot for such an incredible experience. We celebrated our son's birthday and from the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make us feel welcomed and well taken care of.

dairy-exchange-brackenfell.author: Donna Makaluza
dairy-exchange-brackenfell.text: Great prices for dairy products. There are hardly any queues when I visit the store. I was taken aback once when they didn't allow my 4 year old daughter to use their bathroom. I was told to go find a bathroom elsewhere even though they could see the urgency of the situation.

dairy-exchange-brackenfell.author: Trevor Arendse
dairy-exchange-brackenfell.text: Great value for money. Love their ice cream 🍦

dairy-exchange-brackenfell.author: Dean Walmsley
dairy-exchange-brackenfell.text: The ice cream is brilliantly priced and nice and creamy! They also have frozen yoghurt. The 2 litre milk is also better priced than supermarkets and always has a long best before date. I go there weekly now for all my diary products.

the-creamery-caf-durbanville.author: Austyn Cohen
the-creamery-caf-durbanville.text: I visited The Creamery in Durbanville on a Sunday night around 9 pm, and it was such a great way to end the weekend! Despite the late hour, the atmosphere was still lively and welcoming. The staff were friendly and efficient, making the experience smooth and enjoyable.

the-creamery-caf-durbanville.author: Gakeemah Noordien
the-creamery-caf-durbanville.text: Most beautiful of all The Creamery stores with lovely outside seating honing pastel coloured umbrellas. A must try is the waffle with ice cream or a Vanilla raspberry and white chocolate hot cookie 🍪 😋

the-creamery-caf-durbanville.author: Tristan Voigt
the-creamery-caf-durbanville.text: Despite showing on menu photos that you do, this business doesn't make or sell popcorn ice cream. No, this is not a troll review. Yes, I am this upset over popcorn ice cream. Edit: SO SORRY! recently, I received clarification that it is indeed still in existence, just a "seasonal flavour".

whats-the-scoop.author: Cassidy Chiara Thomas
whats-the-scoop.text: Had such a lovely time here, and we were so well taken care of! ☺️ The waffles were amazing and they have some unique and interesting ice cream flavours too. My partner and I got the feta and pepperdew savoury waffle, as well as ones with ice cream (he got nutella and i got honey, which was a wonderful recommendation).

whats-the-scoop.author: Rolenda Alblas
whats-the-scoop.text: Best waffles I've had since my visit to Belgium in 1993! 🤩 We had the savoury and sweet combo. Delicious!!! Excellent value for money and great service. Only one tiny negative; I found the bar stool seating very uncomfortable. Would not keep me from visiting again, though. Thanks for an amazing culinary treat!

whats-the-scoop.author: Jaque Davenport
whats-the-scoop.text: Wow wow Wow. Our first time. Food was good. Friendly staff and excellent service. Thank you Andrew and your team. We will be back

polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.author: Gail Meyer
polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.text: What a Brilliant ice cream shop... Just had the most delightful service by the soft serve ladies... Making my daughter and myself the most divine bubble waffle ice-cream.... R55 each... And wow

polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.author: Thuveshnie Govender
polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.text: Popped in today for their Bubble Waffle Ice Cream! For R45, you get a bubble waffle stuffed with ice cream, packed with 3 toppings of your choosing and a douse of a sauce of your choosing. My sister and I chose to get chocolate and vanilla ice cream, with oreo, peppermint crisp bits, and Astros.

polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.author: Rene Harry
polar-ice-cream-brackenfell.text: THE place to get the BEST ice-cream! 🍦 and the bubble waffle is sooo big and jummy 🔥🤩

chocolat-bistro.author: Alia
chocolat-bistro.text: We Hosted a baby shower yesterday and the service from waiter Karalyn was phenomenal. She was attentive, friendly & helpful. She took care of us and I was impressed with her willingness to ensure that everything ran smoothly. The venue was set up beautifully. Waiters were on point.

chocolat-bistro.author: James K
chocolat-bistro.text: Best to make a reservation because this spot is usually full. Their food is excellent - we’ve tried almost everything and nothing has disappointed. For me the best dishes have been lamb shank and pork belly. And lamb curry. Jees, everything is good! Wonderful venue for a high tea, and you can bring your dog if you sit outside.

chocolat-bistro.author: Reon Da Costa
chocolat-bistro.text: The setting is absolutely beautiful, with both indoor and outdoor seating options that cater to any mood. The space has a charming vintage feel, paired with a chic and thoughtfully curated interior that makes it incredibly visually aesthetic. The food was delicious and well-prepared, adding to the overall experience.

bossa-buh-rein.author: Lourens du Plessis
bossa-buh-rein.text: I have mixed feelings about this place sometimes, but I would like to make a point to mention Nash, Charles and another person who I think is named Rob. Nash amd Charles especially makes me feel welcome and they recognise me even after I haven't been there for a while.

bossa-buh-rein.author: LEVI NAIDOO
bossa-buh-rein.text: Bossa has long been a favorite for casual family gatherings, so we were eager to visit this branch for a relaxed lunch with loved ones. Walking in, we were immediately struck by the sheer size of the restaurant—far more spacious than expected.

bossa-buh-rein.author: Darryl-John Adams
bossa-buh-rein.text: We were 4 adults and 2 children but our bill was for 10 people in order to get a service fee. I feel thats unethical. When asked for bags for the take away the waiter did not assist and had to ask a manager. Food was good and atmosphere

copper-club-tyger-waterfront.author: Danielle Fester
copper-club-tyger-waterfront.text: We visited Copper Club for the first time to celebrate my husband's birthday and what a wonderful experience it was! A special Thank you to our waiter Tinashe for his excellent service! He was friendly, enthusiastic, attentive and made this celebration extra special! Our meals arrived promptly, the Burgers were absolutely delicious!

copper-club-tyger-waterfront.author: Keval Trikam
copper-club-tyger-waterfront.text: I received excellent service from Mtho, who was friendly and attentive. I'm giving 4 stars because the Italian pizza is listed as coming with chorizo, but it looked and tasted more like salami. Other than that, everything was great, and I'll definitely be back again!

copper-club-tyger-waterfront.author: Rick Botha
copper-club-tyger-waterfront.text: Went there for a friend's birthday celebration dinner. Booking was made and it was a lovely place to be at. The view is amazing, if you are seated out by the deck area - you get a great view of the water and surrounding apartments. Wait staff were friendly and very helpful and we're patient with us, as we were the last to leave.

bossa-vredekloof.author: Natasha Gnade
bossa-vredekloof.text: We had a great night. We were a group of about 15 people. The food was delicious and a great atmosphere. Big venue. The drinks menu has a lot to choose from and there are specials during happy hour. The menu is also great with many options to choose from. I had the spring rolls and mozzarella sticks and also pizza.

bossa-vredekloof.author: Annie Williams
bossa-vredekloof.text: Tried Bossa Vredekloof on a Sunday. It was very chilled and laidback. We were a group of 10. James handled us very well. Food and drinks took a while but it was worth the wait the food was top class 👌. I didn’t get pics of all the meals. 🤦🏽‍♀️They also have a play area to keep the kiddies busy. Thank for a lovely afternoon guys ✌️

bossa-vredekloof.author: Megan Wasserman
bossa-vredekloof.text: Best, best, best - Mike and his team are amazing down to every detail. James, our waiter was excellent with our booking for over 30 people and 16 children. The food is incredible and fresh.

kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.author: Nico Visagie
kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.text: We discovered this place quite by accident. We ordered two pizzas and both where incredible! Our waiter, Richard was extremely knowlegable and really easy going. This place is a must visit!

kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.author: Annie Williams
kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.text: Overall great set up. We sat outside, the restaurant is huge in size. Servers are very friendly. It was fairly busy but our food and drinks arrived in good time. Our server Elias was awesome 🙌🏽. We ordered a bunch of starters to share and it was fantastic. Thank you for a lovely evening 👏🏽

kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.author: Abongile Davani
kapstadt-brauhaus-durbanville.text: Thank you for the excellent service Richard 👌🏾 Great taste of German food. Well done to the kitchen staff! The experience was amazing!

die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.author: Chantal du Plessis
die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.text: Lovely experience. We enjoyed the food before show as well as some drinks. The steak was cooked really well. Wholesome dishes overall.

die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.author: Annamarie Erasmus
die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.text: Always an experience visiting the Boer. Great food great vibe

die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.author: Hester Strümpfer
die-boer-restaurant-durbanville.text: It was my first experience, but it was just incredible. I will definitely come again. I got to meet Desiré Gardner and Hannes van Wyk personally. We were served by the well-mannered waiter with the golden plaits. He kept to every undertaking and we received food and drinks at the perfectly right time. Thank you everyone!

boston-coffee-roasters.author: Paul Frier
boston-coffee-roasters.text: Boston coffee roasters has a real community feel about it. Lots of locals frequenting the place. The coffee was outstanding; I had a cortado and an Americano and the blend was excellent. The food was hot and represented great value. The staff were efficient and needed to be as there was a lot of traffic! Highly recommended.

boston-coffee-roasters.author: Charl Esau
boston-coffee-roasters.text: A quaint quiet spot. Good strong coffee, yummy pastries and very friendly staff. Glad we popped in on our way to the fabric shop close by. I loved the Apple Strudel Pastry Roses 🌹 So pretty & so tasty 😋 Very cute idea for a Kitchen tea or High tea 😉 Bonus - there's a clean empty public park across the road where the kids can play while…

boston-coffee-roasters.author: Minette Van Wyk
boston-coffee-roasters.text: This is one of our favourite, cosy, 10/10 coffee and sandwich spots in Cape Town! Great quality coffee, delicious sarmies with feel-at-home-vibe. It’s always a highlight in our week.

boathouse-sushi.author: Andre - Pierre Snyman
boathouse-sushi.text: Good food and very well priced. The sushi buffet is some of the best deals you will ever find l

boathouse-sushi.author: Tania Jeken
boathouse-sushi.text: Sushi buffet was good but the belt items dont get replaced much a d when they do its the same items. Salmon roses have no avo in. You can order from a big selection but it takes very long as they are busy but busy with take away orders that seem to be the priority. The other non sushi items are mostly deep fried.

boathouse-sushi.author: Renet Botha
boathouse-sushi.text: If you want the best sushi experience then this is the place for you. Hudge variaty of dishes to choose from and no limit on the salmon roses. Great food best priced and amazing service. Thank you Boathouse it's a must visit even when my family comes to visit from Gauteng.

romans-pizza-bellville.author: Liyema Mabhengu
romans-pizza-bellville.text: Hey guys, so I ordered from Roman Pizza and I gotta say, it was a letdown. Their pizza tasted like they just slapped some sauce on bread and called it a day 🍞. No depth of flavor, no crispy crust, nothing. Not worth the money, IMHO. Wouldn't recommend

romans-pizza-bellville.author: Slindokuhle Sibeko
romans-pizza-bellville.text: Why the heck would a pizza have so much oil? Stop learning how to make food with our orders . This tasted horrible , smelled like oil and was greasy . Never wasting my money on this

romans-pizza-bellville.author: THANDOLWETHU DOTWANA
romans-pizza-bellville.text: Food tastes nice and freshly warm. Had a great experience at Romans Pizza Bellville. This is my second time here and the service was friendly and efficient. The pizzas were fresh and tasty, and I was pleasantly surprised to receive a Christmas gift box voucher — such a nice festive touch 🎄🍕.

ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.author: Franco
ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.text: This place doesn't desrve to even be on a map.Brought overseas guests here. After they were informed that the guests were arriving around 23h30 this evening. Got to the entranceat exactly 23h30 no security staff at the gate or in the security hut. Pressed the intercom button, it rang and rang for 5 minutes, no answer.

ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.author: Tanisha Moses
ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.text: While I did not stay at the hotel. I had a wikideal for the spa. What a terrible experience. The idea of the wikideal was good but the execution was not as stated and what was done was terrible. It felt like it was both of the therapists first day on the job, they were lost majority of the time. The hygiene was not good.

ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.author: Sharon Gordon-Smith
ruslamere-hotel-and-conference-centre.text: The linen was spotless, the staff friendly and the the food from Fox and Bagel, delicious. The Ruslamere breakfast, very underwhelming. However the studio we were in leaked, ground floor 207. Whenever th be upstairs guests showered th water would rain down on the beside table and bed. So 6 in the morning I got woken up in the rain?

the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.author: Mark Sauls
the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.text: Absolutely phenomenal cookies 😍 the true love, authenticity, and passion for this business speaks through the product. I had the pleasure of meeting Andriette in collaboration with a magazine company, and her aura and energy, along with drive for Mondvol was inspiring to say the least.

the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.author: Kayla Mallinson
the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.text: I ordered the Valentine’s Day “Lover Era” box from Mondvol Cookies and was initially worried it wouldn’t arrive in time, but delivery was perfect. It actually arrived two days before Valentine’s Day. My husband and I shared the box and tried the cookies both cold and at room temperature, and we found they tasted best at room temperature.

the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.author: Dr. Shimon Corcos
the-home-of-mondvol-cookies.text: We were gifted a box of mondvol cookies by a friend, who bought them during a trip to Cape Town. They spoke very highly of these cookies, and boy was she right! Each cookie can be shared between four people, making for a convenient, quick dessert but with such a rich flavour.

blou-winkel.author: Luwellyn Strys
blou-winkel.text: It's obviously good for business if you got feet on the ground. But, the standing and/or waiting time is ridiculous. Secondly, to stand and wait to be served for such a long time makes you listen to the amount of unanswered phone calls. It just seem like no one wants to answer the incoming calls.

blou-winkel.author: Darryll Merkeur
blou-winkel.text: I visited this store today with the intention of purchasing parts totaling R4,000. When I approached the counter to explain my requirements, the staff member completely ignored me to continue a private conversation with a colleague.

blou-winkel.author: Nicolas Pietersen
blou-winkel.text: This place was the best but these days its your last option let me go buy there out of no choice other places are closed reason is the salesmen are very slow and sometimes unprofessional talk with each other or no salesmen at the counter they must get pickers who can bring the parts salesmen are taking 10-15 minutes sometimes to lookup in…

heroes-live.author: Chanelle Brand
heroes-live.text: Leah preformed recently and the experience was wonderful. Was such a lively show and the DJ that followed was just fantastic everyone just started dancing and it was just a blast. The food is a bit pricey but it was good. We were there more for the show than anything else.

heroes-live.author: Angelique Despiegelaere
heroes-live.text: We eagerly booked to see Robbie Wessels, we were gratified with the whole experience. The sound quality was superb and clear. The food was flavourful and reasonably priced. Our waitress was extremely busy and yet she didn't forget about us, she regularly checked in.

heroes-live.author: Lindie Williamson
heroes-live.text: We had such a wonderful experience at Heroes. Our waiter, Bayron, was absolutely excellent, friendly, professional, attentive and made us feel so welcome. The service was outstanding from start to finish. I would definitely recommend Heroes and will gladly visit again.

the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.author: Vera Herbst
the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.text: We visit Bloemhof Restaurant often because the food is always amazing, but today's experience was on another level. When we arrived, the restaurant was absolutely packed. We honestly didn't think we'd get a table, but the manager, Bryce, immediately stepped in and made a plan for us.

the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.author: Lana “LanavK” van Kohler
the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.text: We use to gather here and have a ton of fun. Food was always nice and the atmosphere great. This weekend was the last this place will see of me. I was utterly disgusted and disappointed. I know Cape Town was blessed with some storms, but it is still not lekka when you park and find trash strewn around and used condoms.

the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.author: Xanri Kruger
the-bloemhof-grill-and-guesthouse.text: Me and my husband went for our 7 year anniversary. We love this place and since we moved to Cape Town 2 years ago, this is our go to restaurant. Food is always amazing and the porsion size is always way to much so you can eat this delicious food the next day again 😀 we got served by a waitress named Natalie.

groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.author: Pretty peachy
groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.text: We were on our way to shops and then decided to be spontaneous. We too a left turn into this wine estate after saying for a long time, we need to experience it. The service was great, lekker vibes, beautiful estate and lovely wines.

groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.author: Vikki Barrett
groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.text: An excellent experience. Outdoor tables in courtyard under the trees between the tasting room & the restaurant. Our waitress was helpful & friendly The menu was more ambitious than I had expected - fine dining style with bigger portions. You might struggle if you prefer more basic options. I loved the Globe Artichoke starter.

groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.author: Garry Wilford
groot-phesantekraal-wines-restaurant.text: Lovely place for breakfast, lunch, wine-tasting, just a drink ir even a coffee. The aloes are beautiful in Winter and sitting outside on a sunny day is pure bliss.

fat-cactus-tygervalley.author: Tee La Rouge
fat-cactus-tygervalley.text: I must say for my first begin at any Fat Cactus I’m so impressed. Firstly to the staff 100/10 all their waiters were so friendly and helpful. My child is a busy bee and I love the way they interacted with my best!

fat-cactus-tygervalley.author: tracy joseph
fat-cactus-tygervalley.text: The best was our very amiable, well informed about the food and drinks waitress. She explained the menu efficiently and encouraged us to try the house tequila which was delicious. She graciously made the birthday celebration special by supplying hats for our photos. Nice big colorful venue.

fat-cactus-tygervalley.author: Lizelle Kilian
fat-cactus-tygervalley.text: Had the Red Teddy Birria Tacos and my friend had the vegetarian burrito. Both dishes was a 10 out of 10. Service was a tad slow..but they were quite busy. All in all a lovely lunch experience!

cafe-grano.author: Keith Petty
cafe-grano.text: We were a party of two for lunch. The owner, Bruce Proctor and his staff, were extremely welcoming and very fast and efficient with the service. The food is very flavorsome and good value for money. Portion sizes are good. We had a quiche and savory mince pancake. Each plate came with a special message.

cafe-grano.author: Joy Broughton Maxwell
cafe-grano.text: We stopped in for the most delicious Breakfast. We've been there several times since moving into the area 2 years ago. The menu is phenomenal as are the cakes, pies 🥧, quiches etc. Delightful staff, always with a smile or you may be lucky enough to be served by the owner, Bruce.

cafe-grano.author: Cathy Pretorius
cafe-grano.text: My niece and I went for a Sunday toastie. Welcoming, warm and inviting atmosphere. Sandwiches and chips were delicious and well priced. All round a most enjoyable experience. Will definitely be back.

license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.author: Atomic-Chicken
license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.text: We recently visited License To Grill 007 and had such a great experience! The staff and waiters were incredibly friendly and attentive, the food was delicious, and the drinks were just as enjoyable.

license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.author: kui liu
license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.text: Steak is not very fresh, it has some stink smell, so they put lots of sauce on top, maybe it is not so many ppl ordered it. They don’t have proper steak knife. Maybe we should order burger instead of steak. Service is good, the manger came to ask us the experience with them.

license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.author: Albertronz
license-to-grill-restaurant-durbanville.text: Was surprised at how busy it was, but the food and drinks are reasonably priced and doesn't lack in flavor. It's a great spot for a kids birthday party. So it makes total sense. Definitely worth checking out, especially if you have kids.

bossa-phesantekraal.author: Yolanda
bossa-phesantekraal.text: I Highly recommend Bossa Phesantekraal The 3-cheese spring rolls are a definite favourite - always crispy, cheesy, and delicious. Their burgers are fantastic, the wood-fired pizzas are full of flavour, and the Pepper Jack steak is perfectly prepared every time.

bossa-phesantekraal.author: Annie Williams
bossa-phesantekraal.text: We had the best time at Bossa today. The food and drinks were absolutely fantastic. Our server JR did an amazing job he was part of the vibe. The whole experience was 10/10. Bossa Phesantekraal you made my day and our guests loved their first visit to Bossa. Well done 👏🏽

bossa-phesantekraal.author: Christopher Vermaak
bossa-phesantekraal.text: Outstanding experience at Bossa Phesantekraal! This is a fantastic family-friendly restaurant with a great atmosphere. The beer selection on tap is impressive, with plenty of other drink options to choose from as well. From a foodie perspective, the menu really delivers.

petes-pizza-uitzicht.author: Michael Minnaar
petes-pizza-uitzicht.text: Upon arriving at Pete’s Pizza, I was warmly greeted by every staff member. I was assisted by an older gentleman who took the time to explain the specials and offered some great recommendations. I opted for the large Chicken Pasta with penne, and to my surprise, the order took just 15 minutes to prepare, all made fresh from scratch.

petes-pizza-uitzicht.author: Chris Dos Santos
petes-pizza-uitzicht.text: Ordered a few pizzas 🍕 they were amazing. Even the gluten free ones were fantastic 👌

petes-pizza-uitzicht.author: Megz Skye
petes-pizza-uitzicht.text: Ordered a take away pizza for delivery while in the Vape for business. Prompt service, piping hot pizza with loads of cheese and tops. Great job, ill be back!

omalleys-sports-ale.author: Peter Chong
omalleys-sports-ale.text: Local hangout pub and grub sports bar with Leprechaun beer. Food is average but atmosphere is perfect for watching sports games with family and friends. Kids playing area. Lots of TVs every angle and lots of roomy big tables inside and outside. No craft beers tho but it is the perfect hangout place in the northen suburbs.

omalleys-sports-ale.author: Chay
omalleys-sports-ale.text: Always a fantastic experience at O’Malleys! Their food is absolutely delicious, the staff are warm, friendly, and always make you feel welcome and the managers truly go the extra mile to ensure great service. The atmosphere is lively and fun, making it the perfect spot to relax, celebrate, and enjoy a great meal.

omalleys-sports-ale.author: Marius Neveling
omalleys-sports-ale.text: Ordered a Bird burger special.. asking no onions plse, was told it comes with none. Here comes my order .. onions on the side and hidden under the fillet. Told the server he guarantees me he noted it with the kitchen and takes it back. Here comes my order again no onions. But half the ingredients not there like the the kitchen saying "..

plat-coffee-brackenfell.author: Kim Brandt
plat-coffee-brackenfell.text: Always such a pleasure coming for my cuppa💕 staff are welcoming and friendly no matter the time or weather.

plat-coffee-brackenfell.author: Cobus Du Preez
plat-coffee-brackenfell.text: I give it a 2 star because the brand is great and somewhat consistent. However THIS branch is dropping the ball. I've gone to every Plato there is in the Norther Suburbs more than once including this one and this one is the least friendly, staff on phones, no attention to details on the fit-out and execution...coffee is good tho, but If i…

plat-coffee-brackenfell.author: William Lyons
plat-coffee-brackenfell.text: What a gem. The shop is small, but there’s plenty of seating, and it’s always clean. The coffee is seriously good, always consistent and full of flavour. The baristas are friendly and really know what they’re doing, which makes the whole experience enjoyable. Definitely one of my favourite spots for a great cup of coffee when in the area.

empath-hands.author: Kea Explores
empath-hands.text: So happy to have found Empath Hands. Marcel is so skilled and kind. He made the entire experience comfortable and relaxing. I left feeling so much lighter, like I could nap for days, all the knots had melted away and I’m grateful for the extra care he took around all my pain points.

empath-hands.author: Rina Neumann
empath-hands.text: Marcel is professional, empathic and friendly. He is very efficient in releasing tight muscles. I often refer others to him as well and everyone else is more than grateful for relief of pain and discomfort.

empath-hands.author: Jillian Davey
empath-hands.text: Ohmigosh! Marcel was absolutely fantastic. I highly highly recommend him to anyone who needs deep tissue massage or otherwise. Definitely going again

la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.author: Indya Gleeson
la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.text: My new spot for a massage! I got a 90min cupping treatment done by Ashlyn and it was amazing. Got a FULL body massage with pressure of my choice which included reflexology, pressing on pressure points, and undoing some tight knots in my neck and shoulders.

la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.author: Zanele Mathe - Dube
la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.text: If you're looking for an authentic Thai massage that goes beyond just relaxation, I highly recommend the La Mai Massage and Wellness Spa. I went in feeling stiff and came out feeling light, mobile, and utterly relaxed.

la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.author: Nthabi Dear Manamela
la-mai-massage-and-wellness-spa.text: We made our booking in the morning for 12pm and we were accommdated without hussle. Ashley and Abigail were amazing and did a splendid awesome job. We don't have complains, instead we wanted the massage to continue. Thank you so much for a wonderful experience.

corner-deck.author: Shikara Giani
corner-deck.text: I had an absolutely wonderful experience at Corner Deck, and a big part of that was thanks to Louisa, our waitress. From the moment we arrived, she was warm, friendly, attentive, and genuinely welcoming. Her excellent customer service made us feel valued and comfortable throughout our visit.

corner-deck.author: Roxanne Williams
corner-deck.text: Loved our experience ❤️ rump was really delicious and my hubby enjoyed the fish... thanks for amazing service Louisa was really wonderful with amazing service. We enjoyed our first time and definitely would come back again

corner-deck.author: Liza Hessel
corner-deck.text: Had an incredible dining experience here! The food was delicious, but what really made the evening special was our server, Louisa. She was so welcoming, attentive, and knowledgeable. It’s rare to receive such genuine, high-quality service. We’ll definitely be back—highly recommend asking for Louisa!

speakeasy-on-oxford.author: Andrew de Groot
speakeasy-on-oxford.text: I really enjoy the atmosphere and the service. Great place to just chill and kick back. Prices are reasonable and staff are friendly and attentive. Beer is always cold and fresh. I just wish the owner would invest in some proper bar stools of the correct height for the bar. They just don't know how important this is for many people.

speakeasy-on-oxford.author: A H
speakeasy-on-oxford.text: Beste diens is ALTYD DEUR Heinke ! Jou legend !! If your looking for an awesome place ,laid back vibes but can also definitely turn into a party vibe , you found the place ! Great food, awesome people! Speaks is THE PLACE TO BE 🙌🏼😎

speakeasy-on-oxford.author: Wanja Coetzee
speakeasy-on-oxford.text: Always nice if looking for a local place to hang out. This is more of a chill around, pub place than a formal restaurant. Their chicken strips are always a favourite to snack on. I tried their pizza and it was good. Thin crust, it wasn't super crunchy but also not soggy. Oily cheese on top.

peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.author: Mariska Erasmus
peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.text: The nachos i ordered Hot, it had absolutely no sting, very disappointing. The nachos were cold. Cheese were melted but food was cold when served. My husband had the enchilada and that was hot. All tasted okay, guess we were expecting a bigger flavour than what we received. Enjoyed their cocktails.

peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.author: Cassidy
peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.text: My father, brother, and I arrived shortly after 12:00, and the restaurant was not busy, with only around five tables occupied outside. Despite being clearly visible and acknowledged multiple times by two waitresses, including a blonde waitress, we were never approached and were not given menus.

peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.author: Matthew Moser
peppa-jacks-tex-mex-grill-bar.text: My brother recently brought me through for the Hells Wings Wednesday Deal for my Birthday. Not for everyone, but if you like spice, you'll enjoy this one. You can also get them in any spice level if you prefer more mild. Also had a Burrito here during a previous visit. Very good. Would recommend.

hennies-brackenfell.author: Lisa Adams
hennies-brackenfell.text: This is an honest review from both myself and my partner. We visited on a Saturday morning and found the atmosphere pleasant. The service was good, and it was especially nice to see the manager regularly checking on guests and ensuring everyone was attended to.

hennies-brackenfell.author: Karen Snyders
hennies-brackenfell.text: “Wow… where do I even start! 🤩🍻 From the moment we walked into Hennie's Brackenfell, it was meant to be just a simple midweek family lunch… but it turned into something so much more! 🙌 Our waitress, Ky’Acia Valentyn, was an absolute star 🌟 a little ball of fire full of energy!

hennies-brackenfell.author: Bernedette Carstens
hennies-brackenfell.text: Had a breakfast and so impressed with the service and food, will most definitely be back and recommend if you are looking for a nice, vibey spot. Was back today for the sliders, yummy 😋 and excellent service

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.author: Malcolm Wright
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.text: Great night out with friends and family. All meals were great, tasty and delicious. Good service and friendly staff all round. I had the 500g steak which was done amazingly. Fries on the side with a choc shake. Very yum. Daughter had the hawian pizza which was very good too. Good base with generous toppings.

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.author: Clare Rose
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.text: Tucked away in a secluded spot, the restaurant is easy to miss. Its soft‑glowing lights caught the eye of passers‑by, so I decided to give it a visit. It has an elegant interior blended with a hint of indie‑punk rock style, with every detail thoughtfully decorated.

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.author: Elizabeth Nceda Magagula
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-tyger.text: We booked for a Sunday afternoon lunch/dinner and it was really good! The food portions are massive and tasty, drinks are great and the dessert is definitely a great way to close off. The staff was incredibly friendly and hands on and we'll be back! Many thanks to Olivia, Zintle & Will❤️ our 1st experience will not be our last.

sk-l-bar-and-eatery.author: Günther Jacobsen
sk-l-bar-and-eatery.text: Despite the rough exterior, Skål's patrons and staff provide proper friendly vibes. We were helped by Kiara, and she made sure our whole party were sorted and having a great time. Can't wait to go back there and make some more friends! Only thing I'd love to see; is maybe some of the bikers doing karaoke there some time 😋

sk-l-bar-and-eatery.author: Robin Pheiffer
sk-l-bar-and-eatery.text: What a great place My girlfriend and I have come here on a few occasions now and really grown to love it there. The thing that drew us to it was the vibe and the great music. And then the food is just amazing, best Jalapeño Poppers we’ve ever had.

sk-l-bar-and-eatery.author: Mell
sk-l-bar-and-eatery.text: Had some beers and shots and some free arcade gaming... awesome vibe! Definitely going back

bok-lounge-grill.author: Marcellino Pillay
bok-lounge-grill.text: The staff, patrons and atmosphere is amazing. Value for money. Strict rules in place for everyone safe being. Met the owner who is also quite hands on while flying under the radar. Truly an awesome spot

bok-lounge-grill.author: Ashley Mushfieldt
bok-lounge-grill.text: Hi, I would like to raise a concern about what happened at Bok Lounge last night. Earlier in the evening, I approached management/security to inform them that two gentlemen appeared to be looking for trouble and that I was concerned the situation could escalate.

bok-lounge-grill.author: My_name_is_Lame _
bok-lounge-grill.text: Horrible experience, music is so loud you can barely talk to your friends, not to mention the prices of the alcohol there. Was definitely the first and last time i will be stepping foot into that place. I'd rather spend my time in stellenbosh in better quality bars

danskraal.author: Temarah GalanT
danskraal.text: As a coloured women. I had a blast. All types of music. Love the dancing. 💃🏼 these PEOPLE come to dance

danskraal.author: Abigail Bosson
danskraal.text: Don’t ever go on a Wednesday even though the day they open til 4am. We rocked up at 11pm and they were closed. We knocked and no one was there even though the sliding doors were open the sliding gate was closed. Deeply disappointed would rather drive to Stellenbosch which is an hour away from home than go to Danskraal again.

danskraal.author: Rene Moller
danskraal.text: What a lekker place!! If you looking for a place to (Lang arm) of as Afrikaans people call it Sokkie then this is the place to go. Do not forget your coolerbox with your dinks and snacks.

gringos-cantina-pizzeria.author: B Mac
gringos-cantina-pizzeria.text: Dear Gringos Management and Johnny, I am not usually one to complain about product quality, price, or service. In fact, I have previously purchased pizzas from Gringos and even posted a positive review about both the taste and value received.

gringos-cantina-pizzeria.author: Manuel da Silva
gringos-cantina-pizzeria.text: Wow what an amazing spot. Super friendly hands on service. There pizzas, breakfasts and meals are out of this world. Great venue. If you in the North Suburbs give them a try.

gringos-cantina-pizzeria.author: Mike Storey
gringos-cantina-pizzeria.text: Average bar, nothing special. Pool tables and darts available in pub. Slots also available. Good food and wines. Good selection of alcohol at reasonable prices. Karaoke nights on certain nights. Ample street parking outside Gringos.

the-sports-fan-pub-grill.author: Flown Mars
the-sports-fan-pub-grill.text: I was very disappointed with my experience at Sportfan during an international South African sporting event. One of the main reasons sports supporters visit a pub is to enjoy the atmosphere, excitement, and commentary that comes with watching the game live.

the-sports-fan-pub-grill.author: Johan Ferreira
the-sports-fan-pub-grill.text: Real old school pub. Great take away pizzas and some gambling for those that want to. Barstaff is very friendly and the atmosphere is great to just chill. And they are on when eskom cuts the power, thanks to a generator.

the-sports-fan-pub-grill.author: Warwick Vos
the-sports-fan-pub-grill.text: Bar is well managed, love the Bar Persons. They are all so cool. some really awesome people! Best pizza in Brackenfell and possibly western cape, dare I say!

pizza-pub-restaurant.author: Bernard Rhodes
pizza-pub-restaurant.text: Fast effecient service. Well known Rooster koek menu. No real Dining area to accomodate volume of sales . So dining becomes Tailgating picnic at any time you visit this place

pizza-pub-restaurant.author: Sharon Roux
pizza-pub-restaurant.text: We bought a pizza in the week from pizza pub was very nice perfectly done we ordered pizza today on the phone I told the lady we wanted thick base and then I said don't over cook the cheese and we get the pizza back and it 2as so thin it's would not even stand up straight we take it back the girl tells us the manager said that they will n…

pizza-pub-restaurant.author: Sedick De Jongh
pizza-pub-restaurant.text: I loved the "everyone knows you name" vibe. Everyone was so welcoming to a random stranger on his own 😊

the-drunken-duck-bellville.author: Losh Pather
the-drunken-duck-bellville.text: Ambience, great music and a fun evening with family and friends. Congratulations to Cheryl and her Team on a successful grand opening 👏 🙌 ❤️ . Will be back!

the-drunken-duck-bellville.author: Ian van der Merwe
the-drunken-duck-bellville.text: Went back for the first time since 2013 when I used to live in the area. Was completely surprised how nice the place had become, from the staff to management - excellent, well done. Keep it up. As an editor of a biker magazine, love the idea of how you incorporated biking into your business.

the-drunken-duck-bellville.author: Paul
the-drunken-duck-bellville.text: Love spending time here...different occasions on different days of the week..please do try there BASKETS!! Large portions and food is of wonderful standard and decent price😍 So my post above was years ago...come here again and still the same quality food super awesome ...had the basket below as you can see..

highlander-pub-and-venue.author: Sonja Jordaan
highlander-pub-and-venue.text: Lekke place! Tania our waitress was absolutely phenomenal... Actually all the waitresses are stunning, helpful & very friendly. One can see they work well in a team & is quite hard working too. Loved the atmosphere there!

highlander-pub-and-venue.author: Hayley Gouws
highlander-pub-and-venue.text: It was our 1st time at Highlander, went to see a Steve Hofmeyer show! What a blast! The staff are super efficient! Always ready to take orders! Pizza was great! The toilets was super super clean! Rather surprised as it was 3/4 through the night. And yet it was sparkling clean! I think I found a new hangout spot!

highlander-pub-and-venue.author: Michelle Posthumus
highlander-pub-and-venue.text: This is a fantastic spot to unwind and socialize with friends over a few drinks. The atmosphere is fantastic, and the pool tables are a great addition. The service is exceptional - the staff are super friendly, attentive, and always ensure your needs are met.

stinos-pub-and-grill.author: Anthony Isaacs
stinos-pub-and-grill.text: I trust Stinos with my safety for years already. I get it already and continue to expect good service at the bar and random cleaning services and obviously hygiene. The customers must really also play their part in keeping the facility nice. Thank you

stinos-pub-and-grill.author: Ernest Baltazary
stinos-pub-and-grill.text: You must be careful outside the streets aren't safe walking around at night, and inside there're some Pick pockets you must be careful for your stuff like phones etc, you park a car at your own risk though the management might help you to see through their Cameras inside and outside at their Parking if you lost something..

stinos-pub-and-grill.author: Nikita Munnik
stinos-pub-and-grill.text: There are absolutely no rules and the bouncer is just as wicked as the other staff members there are drug dealers and prostitutes hanging out there and someone actually tried to steel my cellphone out of my pocket and there was so many people around if I didn't catch that boy nobody was gonna tell me and also all ages can go there the bou…

smugglers-sports-pub.author: Alexander
smugglers-sports-pub.text: What's the point of stocking quarts and not allowing them to be consumed after 6? May as well do away with them as that's why people come here to begin with. Consumers will soon vote with their pockets. Stupid business decision.

smugglers-sports-pub.author: Johnna Magatsi
smugglers-sports-pub.text: Clean and quiet place Affordable nice pool table to enjoy and relax

smugglers-sports-pub.author: Etz Dwayne
smugglers-sports-pub.text: It's cool and cozy people's bar A favorite leisure time go to

green-fields-pub.author: Pierre Horne
green-fields-pub.text: A great local pub for as long as i can remember. A real hidden gem when it comes to the great food they serve. I enjoyed some delishes pizza's and lucky for me it was Wednesday pizza night when I visited this place and there pizza are beter than most pizza places in brackenfell like Rio Grande so a big saver for great pizzas .

green-fields-pub.author: Louis Fillies
green-fields-pub.text: Nice place to have a drink and some pizza. Good quality food

green-fields-pub.author: Hendrik van Eeden
green-fields-pub.text: Was great vibe , good prices. And stuff was quick and friendly.

schwarma-pizza-cafe.author: Nomfundo Zondi
schwarma-pizza-cafe.text: I really didn't enjoy my food and was looking forward to the ribs and wings combo. Maybe they must consider increasing the staff because the place my packed and the service was really slow. Other than that the vibe was really great and the fact that they have shisha was a plus for me.

schwarma-pizza-cafe.author: Sinoyolo Mantshi
schwarma-pizza-cafe.text: Innocent have the best multitasking skill. He made us feel welcome. We had the best night of our lives❤️

schwarma-pizza-cafe.author: KUTLWANO NALEDI NYATSO
schwarma-pizza-cafe.text: We were assisted by Innocent - the most amazing service ever!! Thank you for the experience definitely coming back!!!🤭

planet-sports-bar-bellville.author: Pinky Kotani
planet-sports-bar-bellville.text: I did not enter. The security officer was very friendly. We were 4 girls requesting an uber. We needed a place to standby whilst we were waiting for our ride

planet-sports-bar-bellville.author: Sean Noble
planet-sports-bar-bellville.text: Don't judge a book by its cover. I didn't expect to have such a great time with friends; hence, from first thought I was like "why this place?" Great vibe, safe and clean. Affordable place, with pool tables, slot machines and TV's available to watch live sports. Also, friendly staff (including the bouncer)

planet-sports-bar-bellville.author: Ulene Duminy-Le Roux
planet-sports-bar-bellville.text: Nice place to relax , had a very nice evening with karaoke and a happy crowd . They are bit understaffed and there is minor control in the gambling area , which can become a concern . Food , rules of serving food , no food ,not being sold neither can any be brought inside (would be amazing if it was to be made available) .

uncle-stans-pizza-pub.author: Alexander
uncle-stans-pizza-pub.text: This place has transformed literally overnight since the new owners took over. Previously the service was a drag, food none existent and everything was just kak. Now it has become a wonderful place to visit. Really enjoy the attentive service, good specials and atmosphere.

uncle-stans-pizza-pub.author: Leon Conradie
uncle-stans-pizza-pub.text: My first visit Saturday, what a welcoming warm and friendly owner Mr Bertus. He went the extra mile to prepare nice creamy chicken pasta , complimentary to all patrons and staff. We even got an welcoming shooter drink. Even offered his packet of sigarettes should we want to have a smoke.

uncle-stans-pizza-pub.author: Heinrich Reffety
uncle-stans-pizza-pub.text: I like to chill at my neighborhood pub people sre friendly been going there for years before Uncle stan pass on bless his soul bt i must say if it wasnt for that pub people of scottsville would nt have a place to just go blow off work stress & just have a cold beer to run away too " Thank you Uncle Stan for keeping Scottsville ice Colddd"

cheers-on-oxford-pub.author: Simon Erasmus
cheers-on-oxford-pub.text: Small intimate pub, with cheerfull staff, especially Sharon. Great if you want a nice chilled evening with some friends. Would have been cive stars but they replaced the pool table with seats for a restaurant. No food is being served as yet.

cheers-on-oxford-pub.author: flukymaze
cheers-on-oxford-pub.text: Little bar in a odd space in durbanville, they have semi- good prices, and one pool table. The table is very level and well looked after if you want to play a serious game of pool (pool table in it's own room next to the toilets)

cheers-on-oxford-pub.author: Anneliese Stander
cheers-on-oxford-pub.text: A HUGE difference from previous visit some time ago. New management with new vibe and vibrant staff were a good experiance. Cold beer and a huge variety of drinks at reasonable prices. Will go back.

v-bar-brackenfell.author: corne stander
v-bar-brackenfell.text: Chicken strip baskets are really good, would recommend. Really chill place for like after work and things. Pool table is only R5 per game which is nice

v-bar-brackenfell.author: amandah zvirime
v-bar-brackenfell.text: The bouncer that was there last night is a shock, out of the blue he wouldnt open after we had spend and had a good time in the bar. Didnt catch his name but hes the worst No explanation why he was opening ,he just decided he wont open as we have a drink there every night after our shift,he doesnt know whos a regular or not which is bad f…

v-bar-brackenfell.author: VICKY Koen (VIX)
v-bar-brackenfell.text: Nice place . Need bigger menu but staff very friendly and prompt. Had a lekker kuier .

meeting-place.author: Adam
meeting-place.text: An absolute hidden gem, the atmosphere is great, the decor is interesting and odd. The barmen is excellent and the people there feel less like employees and more like friends. This is not a "fancy" bar, you come here to have a good time, not to complain about how it looks. If you don't like it, dont come.

meeting-place.author: Skyler Bernardo
meeting-place.text: WILL NEVER. THESE LIL ROOMS WE RENT. ARE SO SMALL RENTAL 5000.00 BOSS GREG AN AWESOME PERSON..AND THE MAINTANCE GUY..HAKEEM...BRILLIANT

meeting-place.author: Charmaine Vermaak
meeting-place.text: This is a nice place to have a few drinks, home cooked meals aswell as the most delicious burgers and many more. Making new friends. Backpackers rooms to let. And a nice big fire place in the winter. Sexy young barman for the young ladies pool tables.

pipers-pub.author: Anneliese Stander
pipers-pub.text: Was there about 1 year ago and still no upgrades nor any improvements made. There are a supposesibly Non smoking side but all glass dividers between smoking and non smoking are always left wide open, only difference between the two is that there is lights in the smoking area and the barman is always serving that side.

pipers-pub.author: Jacques Frick
pipers-pub.text: I rank this pub as the worst pub in the Western Cape in the service category. I've never seen anything like this in my life. People come from far to support popular stage performers only to be ignored and treated like dirt by their pathetic bar ladies who gives Pipers a terrible reputation.

pipers-pub.author: Flown Mars
pipers-pub.text: Have not been here for a while and was very disappointed with the service to start with and the bathroom was without soap and anything to dry your hands with. Most of the movement was in the smokers area and you had to go that way to get the bartenders attention.

the-corner-rock-bar.author: Zephanallius Zanna Rex- Kori Ponturagia
the-corner-rock-bar.text: My new favourite hangout spot in Durbanville. Went once on a whim and I've been a frequent local. Owner is super friendly and chilled. The Barmen are amazing, the hospitality and warmth from the staff makes it feel like like home. Super clean even the bathrooms which is a massive bonus.

the-corner-rock-bar.author: Wesley De La Harpe
the-corner-rock-bar.text: Nice for a bit of a jol.. Absolutely stupid that they only give normal beer glasses to regular vips. 😱 Nobody wants a brandy and coke in a juice glass. 😂

the-corner-rock-bar.author: Galli
the-corner-rock-bar.text: The amazing live music and DJ's will transform your evening into an unforgettable experience. From friendly barmen to good service with a smile. I can confidently recommend The Corner Rock Bar!

ringos-pub-n-grill.author: Jacques Cronje
ringos-pub-n-grill.text: Nice and neat place. Good venue

ringos-pub-n-grill.author: Louis Rademeyer
ringos-pub-n-grill.text: Basic and simple describes this place well. No frills or fancy "stuff". So if you want to just let your hair hang down - this is the place to do it. You will be sure to enjoy!

ringos-pub-n-grill.author: Natalie Boock
ringos-pub-n-grill.text: Lekker place to relax and have a cold one. Great family vibe. Pool tables available.

stargayzers.author: J Rodney Speak
stargayzers.text: If you want to socialize and interact with different random people and friends from different backgrounds or just have a drink, singing your heart out with kereoke vibes.. recommended to check out, see for yourself and then decide..... Also nice "wors rolletjies", hot chips and some snacks for sale at the entrance..

stargayzers.author: johannes Van Der Westhuizen
stargayzers.text: R50 entry fee. Drink prices vary and lots of bar specials

stargayzers.author: shadé davids
stargayzers.text: I enjoyed the music. There are quite a few steps at the entry way, cost is around forty Rand at the door. The patrons are Uber friendly. I would definitely go there again. It closes around 2am and the company fun till your time runs out. There are little vendors outside with treats to eat and the drinks at the bar are moderately priced.

forest-tavern.author: Gerald Phambani
forest-tavern.text: Kasi style chill spot...Wide selection of liquor...Can do more...Great new look...dj needed i guess

forest-tavern.author: Asanda Faku
forest-tavern.text: It's an amazing place ran by a very warm and hard working woman, I recommend people to buy there.

papa-joes.author: Tanja Smit
papa-joes.text: As DJ's presenting Karaoke at Papa Joe's every Saturday night, we really enjoy the patrons and staff. This little pub really is great.

papa-joes.author: Lana Te Brugge
papa-joes.text: The local watering hole where you walk in a stranger and leave being a member of a family. Zero tolerance for nonsense and great vibes. Really affordable alcohol and great fun encouraged!

papa-joes.author: Sune Huysamen
papa-joes.text: Ive never had a dull moment at Papa Joe's. Best people and always has an amazing vibe. Pizzas to die for and drinks that won't break the bank. Certainly worth the trip

fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.author: Dominic Muller
fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.text: We had such a wonderful experience at Fives Sports Bar! The atmosphere was great, but the food was the absolute highlight of the night. I had the Rump Steak and Avo pizza, and it was honestly the best pizza I’ve had in years. The toppings were fresh, the steak was cooked perfectly, and the flavors were spot on.

fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.author: Natalie P
fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.text: Wanted to watch the Manchester United vs Liverpool game somewhere with my parents and tried the neaby Bossa which was not setup for sport at all, so we left after one drink and thought we'd try here based on reviews. And we are so glad we did!

fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.author: Sheldon Mackridge
fives-sports-bar-grill-pinehurst.text: We had our sons birthday at fives futbol and ordered pizzas here. They placed an excessive tip on the account without asking despite no one serving us or us occupying their space. Pretty disappointed in this. We carted our own pizzas to the party venue.

dantes-premiere-lounge.author: Nadine Khotoo
dantes-premiere-lounge.text: I always have a great time at Dantes Lounge. Awesome service. The food is amazing. The drinks are affordable and the vibe is great. It's safe and very spacious.

dantes-premiere-lounge.author: Tyrique Julius
dantes-premiere-lounge.text: Nice Club to go to if you live in Northern Suburbs.

dantes-premiere-lounge.author: Roger Jacobs
dantes-premiere-lounge.text: Was of waste of time, they are trying to be a lounge with bottle prices, too many young people I think.

livingroom.author: Jim Sekwati
livingroom.text: Nice place. Need to minimize on hubbly or get them their enclosed area 🤔

livingroom.author: Cele Kaya
livingroom.text: Enjoyed my life the last time i was there and looking forward to do it again 😀

down-the-hatch.author: Gavin
down-the-hatch.text: The worst service. Doing them a favour to shop there it seems. Looks like the cashiers are not paid much or they are told the people who buy liquor are scum. Will never buy there again and I hope no one else does either. They are certainly not the cheapest.

down-the-hatch.author: Fabain Roberts
down-the-hatch.text: They are more expensive than the liquor store down the road and they always unfriendly. I only go here when I don't have other options

down-the-hatch.author: shamilla sewparsad
down-the-hatch.text: Very friendly staff and beers and ciders are always cold

jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.author: Sadia Ali
jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.text: Great clean and very spacious park. You can book for a party there. Perfect place to take the kids. There is even an outside gym to do a little exercise. Just one thing that's upsetting is that you cant take your toys to play inside with. Like cricket or a ball to kick around thats not allowed and very boring

jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.author: Robyn-Lee Harris
jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.text: This is definitely one of my favourites. This video was taken 10am on a Sunday morning. My son was playing on the jungle gym and I set back looking up in the trees listening to the birds. We also love this place as it is a lovely safe place for kids to ride their bicycles.

jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.author: Matthew Peter Ford
jack-muller-danie-uys-district-park.text: Peaceful, well-kept space for families and fitness. Walking paths are clean and easy to use. Play areas keep kids active and safe. Security presence adds comfort. A solid spot to unwind, train, or spend time outdoors.

bracken-nature-reserve.author: Willem Van der Merwe
bracken-nature-reserve.text: Stunning wild life - unique Fynbos, Strandveld Fynbos and Renosterveld in one area. Worthwhile protecting. Flowers in full bloom early September. Waiting for the Vygies! Join the walk on the 20th of September 2025. Organized by Friends of Bracken Nature Reserve, COCT, Duprelen Accountants and Pam Golding Properties Brackenfell.

bracken-nature-reserve.author: Madelein Myburgh
bracken-nature-reserve.text: It was out 1st time today to the nature reserve. To say the least it is awesome!! It is so clean and beautiful! There are a lot of security so it is very safe. Will definitely visit at least monthly. Just a pity you cant take dogs on a leash. Thank you for this awesome park

bracken-nature-reserve.author: Byron Green
bracken-nature-reserve.text: A hidden gem of note. Well maintained circular route in a reserve with lots of history attached to it with an elevation that provides stunning views of the surrounding areas as far as your eyes can see, as well as a view of Table Mountain. A shaded picnic spot is also found on trail facing Protea village.

durbanville-nature-reserve.author: Lauren A
durbanville-nature-reserve.text: I've lived in the area for years, but only recently managed to visit the Durbanville Nature Reserve. It's got amazing views and botanical elements to showcase. The trail is very short, and quite narrow; you need to walk in a single file. I'd recommend going quite early, as it can get very hot and dry.

durbanville-nature-reserve.author: Francis Edem (Fran)
durbanville-nature-reserve.text: Place is nice and clean. Good for Sunday afternoon lunches. Large space to play. Good quick hikes. Lots of fauna and flora.

durbanville-nature-reserve.author: Ruan Janse van Rensburg
durbanville-nature-reserve.text: We were greeted at the gate by the park ranger who is there over weekends from 9am. Entrance was free of charge and the reserve consists of a handful short trails (all less than 1km). The reserve gives nice views of the Durbanville Race Course.

boland-dam-park.author: Zané Burger
boland-dam-park.text: Doggy paradise! Great play area for kids and lovely picnic spots with seating!

boland-dam-park.author: Calder Welthagen
boland-dam-park.text: Great park for the four legged fur kind (no not your mother in law... But she will enjoy it as well). Dam for the dogs to swim, obstacle course and open ground to for Fido to play fetch.

boland-dam-park.author: Petro Mc Kenzie
boland-dam-park.text: An absolute fabulous picnic venue for families with two and/or four legged children or grandchildren. Safe, behind fence, huge jungle gym for the children, big grounds for them to run around on and the dogs too, of course. Lovely dam where the kids do some fishing and the dogs freely runs into and enjoy.

uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.author: Evert Brand
uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.text: Wonderfull place to go for a walk or to feed the ducks with your children. Beautifull an peacefull.

uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.author: simelokuhle maphosa
uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.text: It's great for the outdoors to get some sunlight especially for the little ones you can feed some fish and ducks it's also good for also for the sunset

uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.author: DKCPT
uitzicht-greenbelt-body-of-water.text: Its a well looked after park. Clean. And tide. Lovely to take your kids to feed the duck s or to teach fishing had an absolutly awsome time the. And best of all it costs nothing

zoo-dog-park.author: Bronwyn Hoare
zoo-dog-park.text: Lovely park for the dogs to run free. Only problem is, the usual. There are many places where owners have not picked up after their dogs. But overall, a great place for dogs to get rid of their energy.

zoo-dog-park.author: Faye
zoo-dog-park.text: It’s so nice to have a place where dogs can socialise and meet, but there are inconsiderate dog owners who think that they can occupy the park for hours to introduce their aggressive dogs and everyone else must then keep their well socialised, well behaved dogs on leashes even though there is an on-leash park next to it.

zoo-dog-park.author: Megan Goldner
zoo-dog-park.text: Open field for the doggos to run free. Benches to sit on and tall trees that offers shade. We've been there a couple of times, and unfortunately almost every time I'm walking around picking up glass shards and picking thorns out my my dog's paws. Also a lot of dog poop lying around left there by inconsiderate owners.

botterblom-nature-reserve.author: Zaahid
botterblom-nature-reserve.text: Very tranquil, just wish they would open the tree / forest section as well.

botterblom-nature-reserve.author: Mariette O'Brien
botterblom-nature-reserve.text: Don’t have high expectations for a hike or long nature walks. It’s more of a small park for leisure and strolling (on a very short loop). Beautiful and very peaceful. Only one bench to sit on at the pond. But really not much to see or do here, not worth driving far to go see it, great for residents in the area.

botterblom-nature-reserve.author: domenica ferrigno
botterblom-nature-reserve.text: A sweet place to potentially picnic. Lovely view of a small dam with benches. Clean and well taken care of.

thibault-inclusive-play-park.author: Altia Wilcox
thibault-inclusive-play-park.text: I'm a pet walker and I walk 6 dogs for my one client. I've struggled to find pet friendly enclosed parks close to her, but once I found this park, the doggies and I fell in love. They absolutely loved it. Sorry to the surrounding neighbours if we made your doggies bark too much, it will only be twice a week for 45 mins I promise 💖

thibault-inclusive-play-park.author: Sonja Abrahams
thibault-inclusive-play-park.text: The kids enjoyed their Easter egg hunt and had fun on the swings.

thibault-inclusive-play-park.author: a.k.a.joe_joe
thibault-inclusive-play-park.text: Pretty good in comparison to the parks near it. Although the roundabout and wheelchair swings are brocken, in addition the bins are always too full and one of them in particular are melted open possibly due to a small fire caused by a cigarette.

uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.author: Gerrit Vermeulen
uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.text: Lovely but short - maybe a 10 minute stroll. Walk it twice.

uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.author: Leonie Stander
uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.text: My special spot, where I can enjoy peace and quiet, while the two doggie kids can roam wild

uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.author: Brian
uitkamp-wetland-nature-reserve.text: Lovely area for a casual walk

durbanville-golf-club.author: Andreia de Sousa
durbanville-golf-club.text: I hosted my 21st birthday in the functions room last night and it was an absolute ball! Jax is so professional but friendly and approachable, and catered to all of my needs. She simplified the entire process of planning, giving suggestions for decor and the order of events, and maintaining regular contact during the planning process.

durbanville-golf-club.author: Sugen Moodley
durbanville-golf-club.text: I’m currently looking at joining a club in the North and visited the club on Saturday and I’m impressed. I was a bit anxious approaching the club but the people were very friendly. The range was excellent spent an hour well taken care off to most that I have visited in the last month. I’m definitely going back and looking to join soon.

durbanville-golf-club.author: Jaques Mitchell
durbanville-golf-club.text: Recently moved to the area and went to play a round. The facilities are very good and of a high standard. The staff is very friendly and eager to assist where needed. The team is well organized and the course is well managed. Decided to join as a member and the process was well explained. Proud to be a member.

brackenfell-action-sports-arena.author: Jacques Van Zyl
brackenfell-action-sports-arena.text: We frequently support our friend when they have the league contests for netball. Many courts available as well as a variety of sports. Great venue. Drinks and snacks available to purchase. Friendly staff members. Lots of parking available at the centre. Really a safe and secure place.

brackenfell-action-sports-arena.author: karin esterhuizen
brackenfell-action-sports-arena.text: Our 2nd Home. Hahahaha Nice vibe, clean awesome pple Love the action netbal teams Staff very friendly. Krynow the manager awesome dude friendly, helpfull he is also a very good netball player

brackenfell-action-sports-arena.author: Marius Schaffers
brackenfell-action-sports-arena.text: Nice friendly staff. A general cool place to be at

oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.author: Lioeni Mondo
oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.text: Very nice family friendly. Clean and neat. Warm atmosphere. Great for functions.

oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.author: Christiaan Heyns
oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.text: Great semi-indoor padel club. Decent padel shop with enough rental rackets.

oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.author: Celeste Storey
oakdale-club-klub-conference-and-functio.text: Oakdale Club is a gem for local families and visitors alike. They have a great variety to offer from sports facilities to casual braai facilities and conference facilities. They have a huge pool, tennis courts, net ball courts, bowls with clubhouse and squash courts. They also do private functions and have a gambling room.

fives-futbol-pinehurst.author: Donald Buchan
fives-futbol-pinehurst.text: As a loyal customer to Fives Pinehurst for many years: I’m extremely disappointed with my experience at Fives Pinehurst over the past few seasons. The quality of the pitches has been poor and not what players should expect from a venue charging league fees. Score boards also never work.

fives-futbol-pinehurst.author: Sheldon Mackridge
fives-futbol-pinehurst.text: Hosted our sons party here. The venue was dirty and we had to ask for it to be cleaned. One kid got hurt on an exposed screw and it took far to long to find a plaster with very little help from the staff. The place generally needs some attention as it could be so much more. Pity.

fives-futbol-pinehurst.author: Gail Meyer
fives-futbol-pinehurst.text: So so much fun. Booked 10 players for an hour and had a total blast. Exillerating actually. Relaxed afterwards at the Bar for beers and snacks - perfect Saturday out with friends. Clean and easy accessible facilities.

the-bellville-velodrome.author: Sanette Stins
the-bellville-velodrome.text: Allowing people to vape in the stands during Boktown...no security around apart from the few watching that no one enters the VIP stand.

the-bellville-velodrome.author: Mr & Mrs Hap-e
the-bellville-velodrome.text: Bellville Velodrome is a great sports venue in the Cape Town Northern Suburbs with easy access to the N1 highway and other main roads. The sports facilities at the stadium are quite well maintained and provides a great opportunity for up and coming stars to practice and fine-tune their talents, especially in a country where such opportuni…

the-bellville-velodrome.author: Francois Roux
the-bellville-velodrome.text: Waiting for funds from Goverment to repair a venue that is used by young and old.

ellingtons-saloon.author: Lara Lindeque
ellingtons-saloon.text: I don't usually go out to bars but I went with two friends and two other classmates from back in high school, just a get together. I was a bit nervous entering but the atmosphere was great. People where well-mannered, I felt safe, during karaoke everyone hyped people up and the environment was just so lively and fun.

ellingtons-saloon.author: Marisca Santana Alesandro
ellingtons-saloon.text: Ellington’s Bar in Bellville is a cozy, welcoming spot that feels like a home away from home. The staff are friendly and attentive, the atmosphere is lively yet relaxed, and the pool tables and music make it a perfect place to unwind with friends. Prices are fair, and the trivia nights add a fun twist to the week.

ellingtons-saloon.author: Ashurah Carr
ellingtons-saloon.text: This is a really chill place to go to any time you want. They have a nice upstairs area with pool tables and the bartenders are always friendly. On Saturdays they have live bands as well and it's always really good people with a lot of talent. Would recommend 10/10

sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.author: Peter Hanekom
sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.text: Amazing flavour, amazingly good price, well prepared and beautifuly presented. Certainly worthy of my praise as a boerie connoisseur. May I add... wonderful, pleasant social atmosphere, for smokers plus non smokers alike.

sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.author: Albertronz
sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.text: Always fun shooting some pool here. Different tables to cater to different variations of the game. They also have darts, board games, good food and an extensive drinks menu. Smoker section to keep the non-smokers safe. Like the fact that they have different sections so you don't feel uncomfortable or out of place.

sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.author: Barry Baker
sessions-billiard-and-darts-tygervalley.text: If you’re looking for the perfect place to unwind, this pool bar absolutely delivers on every level. From the moment you walk in, you can tell it’s exceptionally well-maintained—the entire space is spotless, and every table gleams like it’s just been polished moments before you arrived.

eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.author: Craig Gordon
eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.text: This place is awesome! It's an obvious YES to becoming a member! It's so worth it; and better, the restaurant is being redone and the putt-putt too! You can literally just spend the whole day there. My chinas and I go often and we have such a jol.

eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.author: Reinhardt Avenant
eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.text: I’ve been a member of this golf driving range for the past three months, and it has been a thoroughly enjoyable experience. Centrally situated in the Northern Suburbs of Cape Town, it’s convenient to reach and provides a welcoming environment for golfers of all levels.

eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.author: Sean Kelly
eagle-golf-ranges-previously-known-as-th.text: We recently visited the newly renovated adventure golf course and it was a great time!. Everything is well-maintained, the course layout is creative and engaging, and the full 18 holes offer varying difficulty. Definitely worth a visit at an affordable price.

hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.author: Thomas Hudson
hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.text: Great place to hang out on race day. Ample free parking and a great relaxed atmosphere. You can sit in a shaded tent right at the post. Only minor complaints are that the starting gates are hidden behind the polo club buildings for most distances, and the horses I picked were too slow

hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.author: Joel Kalipi
hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.text: Family-friendly venue with great energy when the races are happening. Can't wait to go back this weekend. The horses make it all worth it, such beautiful and majestic creatures.

hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.author: Ursula Steenkamp
hollywoodbets-durbanville-racecourse.text: First time here, well organised. Food good. Lovely weather. Will be back

golden-oldies-sports-bar.author: fletcher bernhardt
golden-oldies-sports-bar.text: The drinks are nice and all but the manager is offputting. A few weeks ago a group of friends and I went to oldies for some drinks. And on my way to the bar to order drinks i see him talking to the one female bartender and she looked uncomfortable, she was the bartender that served me and she seemed super out of it but I didnt think too m…

golden-oldies-sports-bar.author: morne me roux
golden-oldies-sports-bar.text: Theo what a ledgen took good care of us Grate service bikers check this spot

golden-oldies-sports-bar.author: Vibo Trail
golden-oldies-sports-bar.text: I was with a group of friends being served at the bar when we all heard the manager making highly inappropriate comments about the female bartender, it was disgusting, and happened multiple times Do not support this place until there is new management - I have never heard more disgusting remarks in the workplace in my life!

avalon-lifestyle-centre.author: Rodger Van Blerk
avalon-lifestyle-centre.text: Beautiful, functional, great outlay. Defnitive a positive attribute to the community, pool, conference facility, crèche, ample of parking, great view, just to name a few. 24h security, even during loadshedding.

avalon-lifestyle-centre.author: Maliske Carstens
avalon-lifestyle-centre.text: Love getting my hair done at Moose Hair, Anneke is just THE BEST!! Been to 2 functions at the life style centre too and it's lovely! As well as the amazing Cappuccinos and variety at the tuck shop!

avalon-lifestyle-centre.author: Erika Morey
avalon-lifestyle-centre.text: Beautiful estate. As guests who can also relac with tenants. My husband enjoyed the fishing at the dam. Beautiful water feature and trees. The centre looked after very well. So tidy and clean and the residents is all very friendly.

bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.author: Zaynab Noordien
bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.text: They hosted us for a team event and we all had an absolute blast! Great fun and fantastic, attentive hosts. They explained everything really well, equipment was all in excellent condition and even made us lovely coffee. Will definitely be back

bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.author: Ashika Moolajee
bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.text: Such a great experience! The instructors were knowledgeable, patient, and made the session so enjoyable. Everything was well explained, and we had a lot of fun. We’ll definitely be back!

bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.author: Lauren October
bowtime-archery-supplies-and-shooting-ra.text: The teachers are so amazing, patient and passionate. I've been here three times and love it more each time. Great for kids too. I brought my husband here for his bday and he loved the experience.

camelot-riding-school.author: Abdul Naidu
camelot-riding-school.text: Robyn is simply amazing. She’s gentle and kind in her approach with guiding you on how to properly ride a horse. She explained everything in detail before we got on the horse, and made the experience whilst riding enjoyable and entertaining! Amazing outback scenery 😌
