camelot-riding-school.author: M Wiese
camelot-riding-school.text: We recently hosted a pony party at Camelot, and it was an incredible experience from start to finish. Although the original party planner was unavailable, instructor Robyn stepped in and absolutely exceeded all expectations. She was fantastic with the children — kind, engaging, and clearly passionate about what she does.

camelot-riding-school.author: Caroline Rogers
camelot-riding-school.text: Such a wonderful and special place with amazing instructors. Adele has been fantastic in helping my riding improve during my weekly lessons (I'm am adult learner) and Robyn is such a lovely and calm (and fun!) guide during beautiful outrides.

taurus-indoor-shooting-range.author: Kozzy Kozmo
taurus-indoor-shooting-range.text: Amazing shooting range very friendly people here, if you want someone that's kind and really knows his stuff talk to Cor Steyn 👌 will recommend this place to anyone that has the love for Guns 🤟🖤

taurus-indoor-shooting-range.author: Neshem Ramsahar (Shem)
taurus-indoor-shooting-range.text: Carl was very helpful in assisting me with my Natshoot targets. The range is clean, well-lit, and well-maintained. I especially liked the motorised target system—it’s easy to operate and makes adjusting distances or changing targets effortless. The booths also offer a good amount of privacy, which added to the overall experience.

taurus-indoor-shooting-range.author: Chad Arijan
taurus-indoor-shooting-range.text: It was actually really cool, first time shooting with my dad, thought it'd be harder than what people say haha. Prices is a bit disappointing, a bit pricey but again, it's pretty cool so yeah.

bio-health.author: Annette Van Aswegen
bio-health.text: From Annette van Aswegen. I wish to thank Erna Bruwer and her team for the extremely well run service they are providing.. I will be 90 in August.. I'm feeling fantastic, better than I have felt in years.. My strength is great. My balance is very good. All due to my session with them once a week.

bio-health.author: Mike Hughes
bio-health.text: If you are dealing with pain or injury or simply want to move better, look no further. Erna and her team of biokinetics professionals are simply the best!

bio-health.author: Rene Bredenkamp
bio-health.text: I am with Bio-health from around 2016, (with and without injuries,) doing rehab and strength training. The people is friendly and the Rehab excellent. I will anytime, suggest Bio-health to people.

the-framed-feather-artshopper.author: Blue Snow
the-framed-feather-artshopper.text: You've captured a beautiful memory of my son that he will treasure forever and be able to show to his children one day. Thank you for your craftsmanship! You were very clear from day one on the process and the duration. We truly appreciate your professionalism!!!! We will be using you for all our framework in the future! 😎😎😎

the-framed-feather-artshopper.author: Candice Thebus
the-framed-feather-artshopper.text: I recently had a canvas painting framed here and I couldn’t be happier with the results. I chose a white wooden frame that perfectly complements the artwork, after chatting to Ilse about her suggestions. The craftsmanship is top-notch, and the service was professional. It’s clear they take pride in their work.

the-framed-feather-artshopper.author: Neville Jullies
the-framed-feather-artshopper.text: Waited 2 months for a simple picture to be framed. Not very friendly staff

rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.author: Aforager
rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.text: Wonderful gallery with diverse artists. Beautiful collection of contemporary ceramics. Cafe is a must. Fresh and well prepared salads, toasted sandwiches, and baked goods. Gracious and engaged staff. Most beautiful tree fern in Southern Africa.

rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.author: marelize tarr
rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.text: If you love art, you have to go look at their exhibition! The restaurant is also lovely we had toasted sandwiches and it was very tasty. There is also a nice size garden if you want to take a walk or just sit there.

rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.author: Quentin Dixon
rust-en-vrede-gallery-and-clay-museum.text: The Rust en Vrede Gallery and Clay Museum is a vibrant cultural hub housed in a historic 1840s building originally constructed as a prison. This art center showcases monthly exhibitions of works by South African artists, alongside a unique Clay Museum featuring an extensive collection of contemporary ceramics.

art-b-gallery.author: William McMahon
art-b-gallery.text: Exceptional service from the Art B Gallery team! Even during the busy launch period of the “Uncurated 2025” exhibition, the team went above and beyond to assist me in acquiring two artworks. Their professionalism, responsiveness, and genuine support made the experience seamless from start to finish.

art-b-gallery.author: Yvette Adams Hess
art-b-gallery.text: I went to visit the Tiny Treasures exhibition and saw the gallery for the first time. Wonderful selection of art and lovely chat with Daleen Louw.

art-b-gallery.author: Trish Storbeck
art-b-gallery.text: A wonderful little gallery showcasing local artists. The exhibits are updated regularly, so it's worth making a return visit from time to time. The people working in the gallery are warm and welcoming. Opening hours seem to correspond with that of the Bellville Library (where the gallery is based).

kingsbridge-art.author: Laurette De Jager
kingsbridge-art.text: Tiaan van Deventer of Kingsbridge is an exceptional photographer specifically as far as photographing fine art such as paintings and sculptural works are concerned. I highly recommend them for high quality photos for catalogue and website purposes.

kingsbridge-art.author: Christel Liebenberg
kingsbridge-art.text: Tiaan at Kingsbridge Art has an exceptional eye for framing. This is truly bespoke framing in every sense of the word. Highly recommended for any artist who cares about how their work is presented.

kingsbridge-art.author: Ryan Li
kingsbridge-art.text: Tiaan from Kingsbridge Art was exceptionally helpful and friendly with all my art and photographic needs. Awesome service and will look to use them again.

atlantis-dunes.author: Dylan Subits
atlantis-dunes.text: An absolutely incredible experience from start to finish. It was my first time riding a quad bike and I honestly loved every second of it. The views across the dunes are stunning, and the whole excursion was very well organized.

atlantis-dunes.author: Carine de Chazal
atlantis-dunes.text: It was our first time in the Dunes. We had a great guide with us! He helped us take loads of pictures!!! Wonderful! It was magic! Want to go back again! Definitely in my planning for my next trip there!!!!

atlantis-dunes.author: Suliana Mataele
atlantis-dunes.text: This activity was probably one of the most fun activities I had in Cape Town! From the fun guide to the hour long excursion! The tour guide even stopped at one point to take our photos. The guide was also very welcoming to the ATV riders. 10/10 would recommend!

zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.author: Kelly Pollet
zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.text: Was so much at regionals, lots of food and stalls, even when it's not nationals or regionals the clubhouse makes great food. Good view from the deck of the track and partly shaded parking thanks to the trees. Only concern, lots of dust which is expected for an mx track

zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.author: corne stander
zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.text: Great place on a Saturday, Sundays a bit more quiet but might catch a rider absolutely sending it. Food is great, especially the platters there. Race weekends awesome 👌 Experienced the MXOAN this weekend and was simply awesome with the action!

zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.author: Cole Goldie
zone-7-mx-zone-7-motocross.text: Always a vibe. I love going here on race days Food options are great and so affordable Drinks are cheap and always cold. Friendly staff

wildx-adventures-wilderness.author: Kian Pezeshki
wildx-adventures-wilderness.text: Patrick is the man! What a great experience and tour. My sister was very scared of the ATV’s Patrick made sure to give her assurance which ended in her not backing out ! The level of patience , positive attitude and overall service from Patrick was great.

wildx-adventures-wilderness.author: Lima
wildx-adventures-wilderness.text: It’s a nice place I loved the bikes and the track is so nice between the trees and a bit dangerous you need to be carful.. The staff were nice and very patient

wildx-adventures-wilderness.author: Marina Barkley
wildx-adventures-wilderness.text: Sandra and Kashaan were amazing. From the start of asking information to booking to actually doing the quad bike trails we were treated so well. We highly recommend not only doing the quad bike trail but using this company. What a fun day out with our family.

wacky-adventures.author: Ashley Darries
wacky-adventures.text: What an absolutely wonderful family friendly location, such welcoming staff who not only kept the place in a clean state they provided just and exceptional service. They brought wood to our campsite that we bought at their onsite tuck shop, and a special thank you to one of the wacky adventure staff members Damian who was an absolute lege…

wacky-adventures.author: Nicole Kim Darries-Poggenpoel
wacky-adventures.text: Booked Wacky for a family getaway to celebrate my husband's 39th, and I have to admit, the place brought out the kid in every single person on camp 🤭🤣 My sell point is the bathrooms, a whole private setup. Toilet, shower and basin with a little table and 2 chairs.

wacky-adventures.author: Tayyibah Abrahams
wacky-adventures.text: We had a wonderful experience yesterday (25/12/25) at Wacky Adventure with our family. As a mom of four, I’m usually the one sitting at a gazebo or constantly walking around supervising the kids, but what I absolutely loved about this place is that the entire facility is visible from the gazebo.

sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.author: Adebayo Aderohunmu
sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.text: Was a good experience. The attendants were very explanatory in how to ride the quad bikes and were also patient, before the ride started. The ride along the mountain was great, with impressive views. The bikes were very functional, no mechanic faults. Very engaging activity.

sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.author: Natalie Hattingh
sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.text: Sam and Mersh gave us an incredible experience! Their instructions were clear, they were super friendly, and they made everything so much fun. They even took photos and videos with my phone, capturing amazing moments. The entire experience was fantastic, topped off with a breathtaking view!

sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.author: Gerald Elske
sa-forest-adventures-hermanus.text: Had a great quad bike session ... easy ride for beginners. Staff are friendly and our guide Lucas was great. If not sure if can ride on your own, they have a test area. Would recommend as an activity to do when in Hermanus

melkbos-4x4.author: Henk Vallentgoed
melkbos-4x4.text: At what point does an owner plow some funds into a venue that is used by corporates and other big groups? This place was terrible 10 years back, nothing has changed, there are just more rubbish on the track and squatters that are threatening towards paying parties. The buildings would look great as a rundown movie set.

melkbos-4x4.author: Adam Kariel
melkbos-4x4.text: Newbie to 4x4'ing. Had a a lekker time at the Bakgat course. Simple enough to complete without experience. Nice course. Went a bit on the harder course with steeper inclines. Most of the course is deep sand and low range is needed. Certain sections require Diff Lock otherwise you will not move.

melkbos-4x4.author: C Nyapule
melkbos-4x4.text: This place is a must is you want to have fun outdoors. We went there for introduction to 4x4 off road experience. The instructor is a very funny, knowledgeable guy with lots of experience. He really enjoyed the training. We were served cooked lunch, which is nice after all the trainings.

wine-valley-adventures.author: Jeanie Bowman Hill
wine-valley-adventures.text: We are so happy to have found Michelle & Wine Valley Adventures in Franschoek! The horses were just fabulous and so well cared for - they were in excellent condition, which is very important for us. We rode up the mountain and through vineyards, and enjoyed every minute. It was most definitely a highlight of our trip.

wine-valley-adventures.author: Laurie J
wine-valley-adventures.text: Great experience with wine valley adventure. Good communication with the owner Michelle ahead of the experience, the horse are super well taken care of and the team is serious about there health from hoove to back. With Wine valley adventure you will not get the bored trail horse !You get the horse perfectly suited to your level.

wine-valley-adventures.author: David Corrales
wine-valley-adventures.text: 10/10 amazing experience. So happy we chose this trail ride. Michelle really makes sure you feel welcomed and safe, her professionalism and over 40 years experience really makes her trail ride the best in capetwon!! So happy we booked! Will come again!

wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.author: Morne Klopper
wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.text: Nice outing for all. Abel, our guide and couch, very helpful and eager to please.

wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.author: Nicole Daniels
wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.text: I booked our tickets on hyperli for the paint ball experience. What an awful experience there was not much for cover just a small section with a few pellets against the trees. I was given 2 locations first location the people said nobody is there then we had to rush to the second location only to be disappointed.

wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.author: Lameez Davids
wildx-adventures-paarl-battle-bunker.text: My family and I had an AWESOME adventure! It was an absolute pleasure to deal with the WILDX Team. Nikki offered a great service from redeeming our Wiki Deal vouchers to the day of our ride.

southern-comfort-quad-bikes.author: Jana Binzer
southern-comfort-quad-bikes.text: Great experience overall! The quad tour was really exciting, and the track was especially fun and well-designed. It offered a perfect mix of challenges and enjoyment, making the ride both thrilling and accessible. The couple was friendly, professional, and made sure everything was well organized.

southern-comfort-quad-bikes.author: Camilla Morrisby KURO-Bō Activated Charcoal
southern-comfort-quad-bikes.text: Loved it. Fun had by the whole family - including kids 9 and 11. Lovely course through the forest, with the right amount of adrenaline for us! Guided by the lovely and patient farmer. Highly recommend.

southern-comfort-quad-bikes.author: Levi Delport
southern-comfort-quad-bikes.text: What a great experience!! The lovely couple who own the farm are so friendly, welcoming and clearly very experienced. From the moment we arrived, we felt completely at ease. They took the time to explain everything properly, making sure we were comfortable and confident before heading out.

quad-biking-cape-town.author: Nicole Evert
quad-biking-cape-town.text: If you're looking for a mixture of ethereality, excitement and adrenaline, the Cape Adventure Zone Quads is the place to go! From start to finish, the tour was nothing short of amazing! The guides were friendly, informative and patient, making sure everyone understood all instructions, and answered any questions anyone had.

quad-biking-cape-town.author: Sheryl Charnley
quad-biking-cape-town.text: What an amazing experience! Loved every second of it, not the part where I almost ran over our guide and crashed into the back of him. Decided best I get on the back with my husband. I've never had a better experience in my life, beats paragliding by far

quad-biking-cape-town.author: Janine Morris
quad-biking-cape-town.text: What an amazing experience! We haven't had so much fun in a long time. I booked a quad biking adventure for my partner's 40th birthday - and it was amazing. The bikes were great and the scenery on the trail in Grabouw is awesome - with mountains and trees and a waterfall. The views and fynbos were absolutely spectacular.

tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.author: Priscilla Schoeman
tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.text: We had such a fun time with the Quad bikes!! The view is so nice and unique! I just want to give a special thank you to: - Freddie at adventure land : goodness did he make the entire quad bike experience so fun and memorable! He made sure to give us the best experience possible and just made us feel so welcome !

tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.author: Denise
tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.text: We booked the Romantic Couples Quad bike Tour and it was simply incredible! The tour first went through the forest and then to the coast. Our guide Rowaan was just great and told us so much about the forest and the traditions. The highlight came at the end - the picnic was breathtakingly beautiful and very tasty.

tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.author: Charlet Shone
tsitsikamma-adventure-land-quad-biking.text: We took the option to have a picnic included and I am so happy we did. The food was amazing with the most amazing view. The tour was so fun. The views were out of this world. Just wow! It started to rain on our way back which made it all the more fun. By far my favorite quad trip. No words to describe how magical.

route-62-mountain-adventures.author: Mark Blake
route-62-mountain-adventures.text: We had a phenomenal time with Dave. Very friendly and supportive to new and experienced climbers. I would recommend to anyone who is considering doing some climbing. He made it very easy and fun.

route-62-mountain-adventures.author: Stefan Wezel
route-62-mountain-adventures.text: Dave was a great guide and we had an awesome day of incredible climbing with him. We were experienced climbers and even though we booked very spontaeneously he had the day planned out so well and selected the perfect routes for us. He is a super nice guy and went above and beyond to show us what Montagu has to offer.

route-62-mountain-adventures.author: Z
route-62-mountain-adventures.text: Dave was a great climbing guide -- I reached out months in advance with a particular grade / challenge in mind and he helped suggest the right routes, and even sent me some guidebook pages. Everything went smoothly day of! Montagu is excellent climbing, and Dave knows the routes well.

mossel-bay-quad-biking.author: BP Van Eyk
mossel-bay-quad-biking.text: With zero experience driving quad bikes the guide gave us thorough instruction in the safe operation of these vehicles. Taking the 8km winding sandy route through the natural bush to the Hartenbos river is a quite adventurous experience.

mossel-bay-quad-biking.author: lilitha Mhlubulwana
mossel-bay-quad-biking.text: The instructor was so amazing and experienced, he gave us an induction first & he was patient. He guided us through the trails and kept stopping and checking on us. We had a fantastic time. We will definitely go back another time.

mossel-bay-quad-biking.author: Abigail Kamusikiri
mossel-bay-quad-biking.text: I fell off a quad bike and broke my arm and am currently waiting for surgery for bone replacement. What made this worse was the complete lack of care shown afterward. Bertus and his wife (I believe) did not call an ambulance or offer any real assistance. No helmets were provided and no safety briefing or protocols were followed.

cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.author: pizama69
cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.text: We had an amazing time in South Africa, and we are so glad we decided to book a tour from this agency. Our guide, Taariq, was very professional, extremely knowledgeable, always on time, and truly passionate about his job. Highly Recomended!

cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.author: Allesa
cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.text: Just came back from a 3 Day Big 5 and Bungy tour and wanted to say that it was awesome! It truly exceeded my expectations. Before booking this trip, I was checking thoroughly different companies and providers, comparing the prices and the value they offer and after a lot of thought I went for CapeXtreme and what a great choice it was.

cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.author: Linet Atis
cape-xtreme-adventure-tours-and-cape-to-.text: This week on Monday, my sisters and I visited Cape Town for the first time and experienced quad biking. Our tour guide, Ernest, was exceptional. He went above and beyond to ensure we felt both safe and enthusiastic while driving through the sand dunes.

walker-bay-adventures.author: Bradley Reagan
walker-bay-adventures.text: Would highly recommend if you're in Hermanus! Great fun. Special shout out to Herman too. I messaged him on WhatsApp a few days before and he was so quick to reply and very helpful and accommodating.

walker-bay-adventures.author: Christopher Maxwell
walker-bay-adventures.text: This is a truly unique, world-class experience of the beautiful South African coastline with its own local feel. We saw seals, common dolphins (100s) and a bryde's whale - all within 60 meters of our kayaks. Our group was small with our guide Bjorn - who has extensive knowledge of Walker Bay and a passion for the environment.

walker-bay-adventures.author: Kathleen Bowin
walker-bay-adventures.text: Unforgettable Kayaking: Dolphins, Seals, and World-Class Service! If you are visiting or living in Hermanus, Walker Bay Adventures is an absolute must. We had the most amazing morning on the water, and the entire process was seamless from start to finish. Herman was incredibly friendly and communicative.

wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.author: Siphokazi Noziqamo Cengimbo
wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.text: What an amazing experience, I bought the vouchers from the FOMO app, I then booked on the watsap on the link sent. Selected my prefered area. Upon arrival I just showed them my booking. We were given the gear and my kids had a quick crush course on how to ride the quard bike. The gentlemen who was the instructor was the best.

wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.author: Like Exploring
wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.text: enjoyable if you like motorsport. Something you can do as a family as well. Quad bikes are well maintained and quite fast. I did a little donut at the end which our guide scolded me for. Sorry! 😃 Make sure to take a buff/scarf/mask and googles..gets very dusty and dirty.. note to self: wear old clothes next time.

wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.author: Andrew Hack
wildx-adventures-harkerville-knysna.text: This was a blast. Great track, good bikes and a guide to keep you safe and take some pics along the way. One of the best 4 wheeler rides around. Be prepared you going to get freaking dirty.

wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.author: Basil Asar
wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.text: Took the 7 Kilometre trail. Was not busy had all so had the guide all to ourselves. Amazing guide and person (unfortunately don’t remember his name), one of the nicest guys. The quad biking itself was cheap and really good. The trail was one of the best and the rain and mist made it even better.

wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.author: Anieka Amos
wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.text: This was such a fun experience. Having gone on the 1hour /15km trip with the quad bikes was so awesome that it didnt feel like it was that long. Im very much a beginner/intermediate quad biker and it was at some places easy and others a bit more challenging which was so thrilling.

wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.author: Mme B.
wildx-adventures-the-crags-in-plettenber.text: We appreciate and recommend. They can be adaptable with international tourists and kids. The secretary is very calm and helpful. One little enjoyed the quad, she was on the guide's quad, and we followed. It's safe and fun. 400rands for an adult and 200r for a kid. 20/25mins.

downhill-adventures.author: Kirsten Karl
downhill-adventures.text: Never again! We booked a combined tour mountain bike and wine tasting. The bikes were in very bad shape. Tire profile was worn. Brakes were not set and helmets did not exist. On the way to the wine tasting the bus broke down, probably not for the first time. On our questions by mail we got until today no answer.

downhill-adventures.author: Jessica Oosterom
downhill-adventures.text: We booked a quad biking tour en could not find the place, so we called the number in the email and nobody picked up the phone.. we drove back to the office where they told us we do not get the money back.. they are thiefs! The guy Alex did not told us the terms of condition before and now he was pretending this is normal!

downhill-adventures.author: Hugo van den Biggelaar
downhill-adventures.text: Sharke Cage Diving One of the worst customer experiences i have ever had. After they switched the time of the activity twice, thereby making it unable for me to attend the trips because of other planned activities, they refused to give my money back.

paradise-4x4.author: Fuad Choonara
paradise-4x4.text: What an awesome experience. If you love roughing it up, camping and 4x4 routes, then this location is a must visit. Very rustic but what an incredibly besutiful and picturesque setting. Amazing views from the top of a dune overlooking the ocean. Brilliant location nestled in the Wilderness area of the Garden Route.

paradise-4x4.author: Lena
paradise-4x4.text: Wild, beautiful and free! I just wish I could stay here forever!

paradise-4x4.author: Sean Hudson
paradise-4x4.text: Initially was planning to stay one night, but had to stay an extra night after experiencing the place. Amazing campsite with views over the ocean. We saw dolphins playing in the waves while we ate breakfast. The toilet and shower overlooking the sea is incredible.

wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.author: Grant
wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.text: We went for the sedgeway adventure...disaster. equipment was in need of repair. Roads were well worn deep tracks full of loose sand. Sedgeway kept getting stuck and slipping....wasted R700. Rather go to Storms river if you want an awesome Sedgeway adventure. We did inform management.

wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.author: Sierra Schemenauer
wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.text: Went out with the family and had an excellent experience. More explanation of where we were going would have been nice but I’ll give you the low down :) we met with a guide at a given address and drove to where the bikes were. From there you go up the mountain on gravel roads so be sure to bring some sunnies for dust.

wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.author: Sonwabo Khumalo
wildx-adventures-george-bookings-only-ba.text: My family and I had an amazing experience for my dads birthday and we were well looked after. They even added some extras for my dads birthday! I will definitely be back and will definitely recommend this to others! Thank you Marissa and team. I’d give 10 stars if I could!

dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.author: Moc An
dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.text: We had a great time kayaking with the group of 10 people. Matt is such a thoughtful and funny leader. Nature is so beautiful and peaceful! Such a lovely experience for a summer day ❤️

dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.author: Lelde Bergere
dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.text: Wonderful and a very relaxing activity! Our kids (11 and 5) and we loved it. Thank you 😊

dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.author: Annie Campbell
dune-adventures-knysna-river-kayaking.text: What a wonderful experience with our guide Matt. So relaxed, so peaceful and the perfect way to start our visit to Knysna. Highly, highly recommend.

active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.author: Lorraine M
active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.text: I paid for 7 laps but only got to do 6. I trusted the staff to keep count, but when I asked how many laps I had completed, the guide couldn’t tell me and simply told me it was time to get off.

active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.author: Kieth-winn Gordon
active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.text: I recommend this place for all families and friends...Quidbiking was fun and nice easy to ride, and if U new to riding Quidbikes, they give u a nice explanation of how to ride🤗. Just wish the track was a bit bigger to enjoy it more😁. Paintballing was fun with my friends. Enjoyed every moment but not getting shot tho😂.

active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.author: Mindi Breunissen
active-adventures-paintballing-and-quad-.text: Fun, fun, fun. Great quad bike and paintball! We enjoyed every moment. Friendly, well trained staff.

side-street-adventures.author: Regina Fugat
side-street-adventures.text: What a fun time this little adventure was. So, before setting out on the road, we were instructed how to use the bikes, and rode around near the shop to become acquainted with the bikes. Once you get the hang of the the little motorized bike, it's actually fairly easy to use. We set out towards the Map of Africa, in a single file.

side-street-adventures.author: Mmaphuti Mlangeni
side-street-adventures.text: Richard was a great guide on the E bike tour. Kept us engaged with the history of the Wilderness, and I wouldn't have asked for a better guide. His dad jokes also grew on me, lol. The scenic ride was enjoyed thoroughly. Richard truly enjoys what he does, and his passion emanates. Very polite young man.

side-street-adventures.author: Grant Durr
side-street-adventures.text: I highly recommend this Ebike Tour. We had a total of 8 people and 2 very skilled and entertaining guides accompanied us on the guided tour of the area surrounding Wilderness. It was visually stunning, providing simply breathtaking views.

paarl-trails-spice-route.author: Kayleigh Tuck
paarl-trails-spice-route.text: Unfortunately the blue route I cycled wasn’t worth the R100 I paid. Badly marked in some sections, a few markers missing and barely any single track. Mostly sandy roads and badly maintained paths. The one section has dangerous broken bridges. One trail had a random piece of corrugated iron in the middle.

paarl-trails-spice-route.author: Hein Kershoff
paarl-trails-spice-route.text: Km's of Awesome Trails! If only one could buy fitness in a capsule form🤔 I'd spend the whole day exploring all the routes!😁😁😁 Well done Paarl Adventures! Keep up the good work! Trails i rode on in excellent condition.

paarl-trails-spice-route.author: Stephen Lennon
paarl-trails-spice-route.text: Great trails but poorly marked routes. Too easy to get lost

ingwe-adventures.author: Danuta Wienand
ingwe-adventures.text: Sky High Consulting had a great time at Ingwe. Debbie and her team were very professional and kept us engaged. We thoroughly enjoyed the obstacle course. Would highly recommend Ingwe Adventures.

ingwe-adventures.author: Philip Schroder
ingwe-adventures.text: We just came back from a Team Building camp with INGWE. I am sure I am talking on behalf of most of our students from the Hands & Heart programme when I say it was an incredible time of self development and learning. Many thanks for your input in the lives of the young people we work with.

ingwe-adventures.author: Tagan Hoyle
ingwe-adventures.text: I went in thinking this was going to be a waste of my time, and I came out knowing it was a waste of my time. This 'Ingwe' Adventure was just your standard rebranded teambuilding exercise. I learnt nothing new from this than what I did from doing this camps as a child during school.

map-of-africa.author: Esri-Jané Köhne
map-of-africa.text: Beautiful! Will always make a stop here when in the area. Doggies really enjoyed playing on the big open field. Only negative part was the guy trying to navigate parking, polluting the fresh air with whatever he was smoking/high on and expecting a tip for it. All-in-all beautiful place will go back there.

map-of-africa.author: Danie F
map-of-africa.text: I stayed at Map of Africa in Wilderness. What a lovely experience. Units were clean, neat and supper comfortable. Stunning views over the bush and ocean. I highly recommend the place. Darryl awesome with info and very caring

map-of-africa.author: wolf352l
map-of-africa.text: Stunning, View. Go there and meet Rosanne, the Lady who keeps the Place maintained. She will share interesting Facts and Story. Oh, and give a good Tip!

cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Karl Tarvas
cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: Oh my days! What an amazing experience and what a privilege it is indeed to glide over Cape Town with the wind in your ears. Thank you Tim! You've left a permanent mark on my memories. I don't know how I'm gonna tell my mom, but apparently I'm into paragliding now.

cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Rajendra Singh Rathore
cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: Had an absolutely incredible experience today! The flight was incredibly smooth from start to finish. My pilot Fanie Badenhorst making me feel safe and comfortable the entire time. His expertise really showed, and the views over Cape Town were breathtaking.

cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Matt Payne
cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: Love love loved it! The weather / wind can sometimes get in the way but this is one amazing life experience made better not just by the location but also the people. Was utterly stupendous! Big love to Gerrie B and team for an experience i will remember always

fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Kathy de la Porte
fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: Great experience. My instructor, Alois, is a lovely guy. Quick briefing and then up, up and away. The weather was gorgeous but not enough thermals to stay up for as long as I would have liked. I felt completely safe up there with Alois. Would love to do it again! I would recommend this company. Also, great videos and photos were taken 😊

fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Grant Morris
fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: Huge shoutout to Fly Cape Town for an unforgettable 30th birthday flight! My instructor, Alios, was an absolute legend and made the whole experience epic. The entire operation was incredibly slick—from the seamless communication to the friendly crew and also the media package was super well done.

fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.author: Daniel
fly-cape-town-tandem-paragliding.text: The flight instructor was friendly and funny - cracking jokes to keep the experience lighthearted. The takeoff was smooth and my time in the air was incredible. Smooth landing as well. Overall amazing experience.

skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.author: Vilma Jahren
skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.text: Great experience! Five of us jumped tandem and we got to ride in the same plane. Such a great team working there and everything was very professional and safe. Thank you!

skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.author: David Weidmann
skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.text: What a great experience! We were traveling with a large group in South Africa and spontaneously decided that five of us would take the plunge. From the easy booking with very friendly contact via WhatsApp to the warm welcome, the professional briefing, and the jump itself — this short visit to Skydive Mossel Bay was simply amazing.

skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.author: Simit Vora
skydive-mossel-bay-mossel-bay-airfield.text: I had a great time. Graham, my instructor was exceptional, my fear went away with him having my back. The facility was amazing !! Arnold, my wife's instructor was great too, she felt safe enough to jump in 1st. The view and experience was fantastic ! Highly recommend.

wild2fly-paragliding.author: Nicole Miklos
wild2fly-paragliding.text: We had an amazing experience. Even though my dad does not speak English at all, the guides did everything to keep him calm and safe. The view was stunning. The team was absolutely incredible. It was my second time but pretty sure not my last time. Greetings from Nicole, my dad and my husband stefan.

wild2fly-paragliding.author: Paul Van Hemeldonck
wild2fly-paragliding.text: I have just finished my basic license course with Johan and the team last week and I had a fantastic time! Going here to Wilderness is just mind-blowing and spoils your way of looking at the nature of South Africa. Every hike I have done here in SA cannot compete with the view of Paradise ridge once you have been out there flying.

wild2fly-paragliding.author: Tayo Scott
wild2fly-paragliding.text: Truly amazing experience. Went to do a paragliding license and they were super helpful, even going outside usual course times to accommodate me. Johans knowledge was also amazing and he was able to keep me safe while letting me enjoy myself and giving me the necessary skills to develop my flying. 10/10 would recommend to anyone!

fly-time-paragliding.author: Yolande Collins
fly-time-paragliding.text: This was my first time paragliding, so I didn't know what to expect. It was absolutely awesome. Not at all scary, very gentle, so quiet and peaceful. Sue and Pete are great people. Sue was the best pilot a first timer could ask for, so gentle and respectful to me and what I was experiencing. Thankyou again Sue, for such a special gift.

fly-time-paragliding.author: S R
fly-time-paragliding.text: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ We were repeat flyers from 2023 and came back today – this time with family and friends! Seven of us booked the Adventure Flight, and it was absolutely incredible! 🪂 The organization was perfect, and the pilots were super friendly, professional, and full of humor. From the very beginning, we felt safe and completely at ease.

fly-time-paragliding.author: Gerhard Fouche
fly-time-paragliding.text: We enjoyed the whole experience tremendously. Every detail of the excursion was well executed, organised and timely. All the staff were friendly, helpful and cortious and made sure that we enjoyed every aspect of the morning. We would recommend this to everyone visiting the area, seeking to do something different and exciting.

cloudbase-paragliding.author: Tania Nieuwoudt
cloudbase-paragliding.text: Wow amazing. Jan you are amazing and the rest of the team too. I can recommend them. We felt safe all the way. We had the best time of our life.

cloudbase-paragliding.author: Carina Duvenage
cloudbase-paragliding.text: We had an amazing paragliding experience! Huge thanks to Jan for the incredible ride—professional, friendly, and made us feel completely safe the whole time. The entire team was fantastic and made the day unforgettable. Highly recommend this company for anyone looking for an unforgettable adventure!

cloudbase-paragliding.author: Wanda Denis
cloudbase-paragliding.text: The Cloudbased team was incredibly informative and tenacious. The weather was not cooperating, but they persevered and found a safe day to have us experience our first ever paragliding flight. It was so exhilarating. I finished my flight thinking I would want to get my license....Thanks to the whole team

birdmen-paragliding.author: alistair beattie
birdmen-paragliding.text: Barry and Candice run a very professional operation in terms of daily flying support, ground support and accommodation. A group of 16 of us had a very successful two weeks flying in a wide range of locations and conditions.

birdmen-paragliding.author: Dario Scura
birdmen-paragliding.text: Had an awesome paragliding trip with this flight school – for the second time, and it was brilliant again! Barry and Candice are a lovely, friendly couple, as well as professional and perfectly organised. Lots of fun and great vibes all around. I can highly recommend them and will definitely fly with them again. Thanks a lot guys! 🪂

birdmen-paragliding.author: Arthur Sagge
birdmen-paragliding.text: One of the most exciting experiences I’ve ever had! Barry made the technical concepts of paragliding easy to digest and was very professional (and very patient despite me flying into a few bushes 😅).

kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.author: Jessie Watson
kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.text: This gorgeous stretch of beach 🏖 with its amazing sunsets and it is a pet friendly beach is nestled inside the quaint village of Kleinkrantz, 🌊I usually find most of the beach to myself and often have we seen a pod of dolphins swimming by.

kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.author: Jan Minnaar
kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.text: Please follow the site rules as displayed on the information boards. Please respect the home owners private property.

kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.author: olaf birdy
kleinkrantz-dune-paragliding-wilderness-.text: Paragliding is great here. Fantastic views... Great Indian ocean to splash in. Super fishing. Close to Wilderness town and reasonable Restaurants. 35 km to the Airport. Many cozy Guest houses to stay.

paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.author: Ethan “ethanchx” Chellan
paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.text: An unforgettable paragliding experience! Paraglide Africa offers breathtaking views and exceptional service with skilled instructors ensuring safety and enjoyment. A must-try adventure for thrill-seekers in South Africa.

paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.author: Avenue Aesthetics
paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.text: What an amazing experience! The weather was a bit dicey, but when we were able to go, we had a blast. Andre was so much fun and it is clear that the pilots know their stuff! We flew Knysna and even though it was overcast, the views were still breathtaking!

paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.author: Kyle-James Holburn
paraglide-africa-beach-hotel.text: From ground to air we had a great paragliding experience with the Paraglide Africa crew and I highly recommend them!

paraglide-africa-wilderness.author: Zacchary Herbst
paraglide-africa-wilderness.text: An excellent paragliding course with the Para Africa Team. Rouberre, Theunis, Tyla and sometimes even Jean were full of knowledge and made us feel safe in the air. An amazing course that I suggest everybody tries, especially with them 😍

paraglide-africa-wilderness.author: Apurva Mehta
paraglide-africa-wilderness.text: I highly recommend the Paraglide Africa instructors (Rouberre, Theunis & Tyla) if you want to learn to fly like a bird along the stunning Garden Route. They build good habits from the start and, most importantly, keep you extremely safe and guide you away from dangerous actions, talking you through each step on the radio and letting you m…

paraglide-africa-wilderness.author: Jake Mcmullon
paraglide-africa-wilderness.text: Did my paragliding license at Paraglide Africa and it was very well managed with a lot of fun activities planned. Rouberre and Tyla are amazing and so helpful in all aspects. Would highly recommend to come here for either a tandem or doing you full paraglide license

lions-head-paragliding.author: Laela Kashan
lions-head-paragliding.text: My sister and I booked online which was easy. We not only lost the phone with our reservation info but then we ended up double booked with another activity that made changes- but this company didn’t blink an eye when I made contact to explain. They accommodated our new need to fly on a different day. We paraglided from Signal Hill.

lions-head-paragliding.author: Wendy Orpen-Lyall
lions-head-paragliding.text: Unfortunately unable to do 0 stars. My son was gifted a skydiving experience voucher.... They have disappeared!!! Been trying to contact them for months. Website says under construction and phone is never answered. DON'T BOOK WITH THEM.

lions-head-paragliding.author: Renata Caira
lions-head-paragliding.text: What a wonderful experience!!! I was really excited to paraglide but also a little nervous...but Marcus was fantastic, and I knew I was in very safe hands. What an awesome way to see Cape Town!!! Highly recommended!!!!

untouched-adventures.author: shannyn jade pillay
untouched-adventures.text: 10/10 bucket list experience! The staff are all so friendly and our guide Romeo was excellent! Visited the Tsitsikamma National Park during the December holidays which means it does get very full and parking is limited. Best to book an early morning slot to avoid delays getting into the park and before the sun starts to burn.

untouched-adventures.author: Veruschka Lala
untouched-adventures.text: We had an amazing time on the kayak and lilo adventure with Untouched Adventures. It was our first time kayaking in the ocean and we were quite nervous, but our guides, Romeo and Alfonso, were absolutely incredible—patient, supportive, and reassuring throughout. They made the whole experience so enjoyable. Highly recommend!

untouched-adventures.author: Saki Marais
untouched-adventures.text: This was an absolute amazing experience! A must do for anyone! Out guides Romeo and OG was extremely knowledgeable and fun! Thanks for an amazing experience guys!

kayak-clifton.author: Merzesh Magra
kayak-clifton.text: A fantastic experience! Amazing views of Clifton beach from the waters. Jordan was very accommodating and welcoming even as I pitched up just as he was about to set off on a tour I wanted to join. I would highly recommend the kyak tour as compared to renting out a Kyak yourself.

kayak-clifton.author: AimeeEli Kobrin
kayak-clifton.text: 10/10 perfect Kayak Clifton was an absolutely amazing experience from start to finish. The service was exceptional professional, friendly, and incredibly well-organised. Jordan our guide was too quality. Friendly and super knowledgeable.. Exploring the coastline from the water was amazing with stunning views with a relaxed atmosphere..

kayak-clifton.author: Kath
kayak-clifton.text: What an awesome experience! I was a little nervous before we left, but it was so peaceful out on the water and the guides were really great. Everything went well a d I will definitely come back, I highly recommend them. Perfect for all ages and such a fun family or couple thing to do in our beautiful city. Thanks so much to the team!

cape-kayak-adventures.author: Candace Couzens
cape-kayak-adventures.text: Had the most incredible day with 10 Family members! Cape Kayak Adventures made our day! It felt like we were in another world! Suddenly on the water everything in the city quietens down and the clear and gorgeously smooth, liquid sapphire like waters envelope you! Along the the gentle rocking of the currents what a relaxing experience!

cape-kayak-adventures.author: Kiara Gloria Jones
cape-kayak-adventures.text: I had an excellent time kayaking on Sunday morning. The guide was extremely friendly and informative, which made the whole experience even better. The trip was well organised and punctual, and we were lucky enough to spot dolphins along the way - such a special bonus!

cape-kayak-adventures.author: Louise Bangani
cape-kayak-adventures.text: What an amazing experience! As a first-time kayaker, the entire experience exceeded my expectations. The owner and staff are professional, friendly, and incredibly supportive, which made the whole adventure feel comfortable and fun. If I had to choose a company again, it would be definitely be Cape Kayak Adventures without hesitation.

atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.author: danielle van jaarsveld
atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.text: We had the most incredible experience with Atlantic Outlook. Within the first 10 minutes we already spotted dolphins, which felt unreal. This is honestly easily in our top three experiences ever. There’s something so calming about being out on the water and so close to nature.

atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.author: Richard McMartin
atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.text: We did an afternoon paddle as our corporate year end function! Can’t recommend it enough! Great team met us at Waterfront and sorted paddles & life jackets, stable and easy to use boats and setup. Saw dolphins, seals, birds and all round a very lekker time.

atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.author: MeiZu
atlantic-outlook-kayak-cape-town-tours.text: Shaun and Dave were super flexible and accommodating even with our last minute changes. The paddle was beautiful despite the Westerly wind. The equipment was in superb condition and made everyone feel safe. We had a great time and even saw some Dolphins. Hugest thanks.

kayak-adventures-waterfront.author: Hubert Alan White
kayak-adventures-waterfront.text: Did the night tour with Jesse whom was a cool host and got some great breakfast/dinner spot recommendations! (Went to one this morning and it lived up to the hype!) Area is a real vibe with the lights and calm/clear waters. Definitely would recommend as a chill evening activity in the city.

kayak-adventures-waterfront.author: Busi Mots
kayak-adventures-waterfront.text: What a wonderful experience. I must commend Josh for the great tour, I was initially nervous as this was my first time but he calmed all my fears and was patient with me, I appreciate that. Because of the great experience I've had with Josh, I'll be visiting other locations as well 😁 I hope the reception will be just as warm.

kayak-adventures-waterfront.author: Japie Oosthuizen
kayak-adventures-waterfront.text: What an awesome experience. It is ideal for a family outing. We will definitely be back for the night version. I enjoyed the stories the tour guide had. Still water and not much noise. Improvement areas - cellphone pockets were sold out, staff presence should be at least 30min before the time.

animal-ocean-expeditions.author: Olivia Pearson
animal-ocean-expeditions.text: My favourite experience in Cape Town by far! The team were welcoming and informative from the moment we walked through the door and delivered an incredible and authentic experience. I loved that we got to snorkel in the kelp forest, unlike many other ocean tours in the area. The hot chocolate and snacks afterwards were a lovely edition!

animal-ocean-expeditions.author: Kayleigh Hayes
animal-ocean-expeditions.text: What an unforgettable experience with Animal Ocean, easily one of the best experiences of my life. The team’s passion and knowledge of the ocean were truly incredible, and their friendly, easy-going nature made the entire trip even more enjoyable.

animal-ocean-expeditions.author: Melissa van Leijenhorst
animal-ocean-expeditions.text: Our Ocean Safari was absolutely amazing! The crew was so friendly and welcoming, and the whole experience was unforgettable. We saw lots of wildlife, including seals and dolphins and got to snorkel around a shipwreck, which was such an incredible adventure. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for something fun and unique!

kayak-cape-town-simons-town.author: Sue-Anne Stander
kayak-cape-town-simons-town.text: It was the perfect day in every way. On this breathless and balmy morning, Hank danced our kayaks over the light swells, introduced us to his feathered friends and, listening to his stories we fell just a little more in love with Simons Town. The pace was just right and the scenery jaw-dropping. This experience is unmissable!!

kayak-cape-town-simons-town.author: Shelley Whitmee
kayak-cape-town-simons-town.text: A great experience with wonderful views and opportunity to see wildlife while on the ocean. The guides are really good, explain everything really clearly and the kyacks are really stable. This is a great experience for inexperienced and experienced paddlers.

kayak-cape-town-simons-town.author: Gildy Dike
kayak-cape-town-simons-town.text: Henk very kindly included us in his outing this morning after I had a ‘seniors moment’ and arrived at the wrong destination. Experiencing the abundant sea life up close while enjoying an easy paddle in near perfect conditions was very special. Two hours of quality time with quality guides is highly recommended.

knysna-charters.author: Bankole Ubogu
knysna-charters.text: Keon and Damien were super friendly knowledgeable and eager to answer questions. The experience of trying to shuck our own oysters was great. Knysna Boat Charters was also very flexible in trying to accommodate our tight schedule and would highly recommend.

knysna-charters.author: Dieter SgB
knysna-charters.text: Our tour guide booked this tour for us. We made a sunset cruise with some family members starting at 5:30 pm lasting 1:30 h. Our skipper Gabriel made a good safety briefing and conducted the tour professionally giving good explanations on the sightseeing points.

knysna-charters.author: Luke Wilson
knysna-charters.text: An amazing experience! My wife and I did the quad biking, and it was super thrilling! We highly recommend it for those looking for an adrenaline boost! Our guides were awesome, friendly, knowledgeable and super accommodating to the pace we wanted to go (fast). It was so much fun that we wanted to go again right after!

kayak-adventures.author: Felicitas Müller
kayak-adventures.text: The kayak tour with Clamon was an unforgettable experience! From the very beginning, we were warmly welcomed and given a clear, professional introduction. Clamon has an great knowledge of the local wildlife and the area, and he answered all our questions with genuine enthusiasm.

kayak-adventures.author: Arno Meyers
kayak-adventures.text: Kayak Adventure worth note! A really great experience and guided tour by kayak adventure and our guide Duncan. We selected to 19:30 time slot for the hour guided tour at battery park.

kayak-adventures.author: Frances Whitburn
kayak-adventures.text: Great company!! Local guides had a lovely morning out on the water. Really enjoyed the local guides lovely Team and efficient at booking stages as well. Safety talk before was well done and concise. Loved that they had phone pouches for sale at the arrival desk. Super useful if you don’t have one.

waterfront-kayak.author: Giles & Co
waterfront-kayak.text: Thank you so much for this morning. It was spectacular. The guides, Ant and Gustavo were incredible. Took stunning footage!!! Dolphins, seals snacking on octopus, Jackass Penguins!! Thank you once again! Will most definitely be sending people to you xxx #ecoventurist

waterfront-kayak.author: paul livingstone
waterfront-kayak.text: I would highly reccomend this company if you're interested in a unique Cape Town experience. The kayak adventure took 2 hours along with very experienced guides and we enjoyed the easy rowing along the sea side of the promenade with fantastic views of the mountain, the V&A Waterfront and all the yachts out at sea.

waterfront-kayak.author: Ian Grace
waterfront-kayak.text: What a superb experience, a must-do for any visitor to CT, or local alike. Expertly guided by Anthony and John, we had a wonderful, unrushed experience kayaking amongst dolphins and seals, all on a still ocean with Cape Town's unbeatable mountain vistas as backdrop. Do it, you will not regret it.

kayak-adventures-simons-town.author: Tiffany Schultz
kayak-adventures-simons-town.text: This was such an amazing experience! We did the simonstown paddle with a team of 12 from Dubai. Jesse and the other guides were wonderful, friendly, helpful and knowledgeable.

kayak-adventures-simons-town.author: Laverne Dunn
kayak-adventures-simons-town.text: My cousin/nephew Ethan and I Laverne went kayaking on Friday the 2nd January. We thoroughly enjoyed it. Thank you so much to our amazing Guides Jessie and Duncan.. you kept me calm( Laverne) this was my best kayak so far. Jessie was so informative which was really amazing. I definitely will be back again.

kayak-adventures-simons-town.author: DeVilliers Lombaard
kayak-adventures-simons-town.text: What an awesome experience. Special thanks to Jessie our guide. Great guide with excellent knowledge and personality to make the adventure extra special.

yzerfontein-sea-sport.author: Cindy Landsdale
yzerfontein-sea-sport.text: The most amazing experience. Adré has so much knowledge about the Island!! We were fortunate to have an encounter with a whale!!! Thank u Adrian, Michael & Benji & Ambrose. Highly recommended!!! Cute little animal mementos to take home to remember!!

yzerfontein-sea-sport.author: Adrian Tregoning
yzerfontein-sea-sport.text: We recently has the pleasure of joining Adré on a boat trip around Dassen Island. Double thumbs up. From clear and concise communication before the trip, to the entire trip itself - all just right. Something so few businesses can achieve. My kids and my mother in her 70's had the time of our lives, myself included.

yzerfontein-sea-sport.author: Amie Shute
yzerfontein-sea-sport.text: Adré, Michael and Benji 🐾 all made us feel most welcome on arrival. We had an incredible boat trip, very professional business. Adré was very knowledgable and told us great stories of shipwrecks on the island and all about the wildlife. We were incredible lucky to have experienced a wonderful close encounter with a humpback whale.

wilderness-river-safaris.author: D S
wilderness-river-safaris.text: Absolutely worth the money! Mike is great — super easygoing, knowledgeable, and made the whole experience unforgettable. It was the perfect start to the morning and so easy to arrange. If I’d had more time, I honestly would have done this every day I was there. Highly recommend!

wilderness-river-safaris.author: Alex B.
wilderness-river-safaris.text: A great tour if you're in Wilderness. We really enjoyed the two-hour boat ride in the afternoon. Mike is a laid-back guide and can identify every bird in the reeds right away. Highly recommended.

wilderness-river-safaris.author: Lauren Greasley
wilderness-river-safaris.text: A wonderful trip along the river. The gentleman that took us was extremely knowledgeable and friendly. We saw different birds and even a boomslang. A highly recommended activity. Thank you!

keurbooms-ferries.author: Karin Heroux
keurbooms-ferries.text: Captain Mike was very informative and great at spotting birds. I finally got my Knysna lourie. It is worth every penny.

keurbooms-ferries.author: Barefoot mart
keurbooms-ferries.text: Very good guide, nice boat ride and a refreshing swim at the midway point of the tour. Too many boats and people you dont see any wildlife. We met some nice travelers on the boat.

keurbooms-ferries.author: True Review
keurbooms-ferries.text: The most amazing views. A lovely day out surrounded by nature. Efficient, fast, friendly service.

dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.author: Alice Evans
dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.text: What an epic adventure!!! It’s an absolute must-do when visiting Plett, and for locals alike! Tristan was an excellent guide and made us feel safe and well informed all the way. Get out there - it’s simply beautiful!

dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.author: Mish
dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.text: We had SUCH a good surf class with Dolphin Adventures, great surf coaches, very patient as we had some younger kids. All in five stars and highly recommended!!!

dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.author: Pierre Dixon
dolphin-adventures-sea-kayaking.text: This was the worst experience. We made a booking online and paid. We arrived at the scheduled time, for Giovanni to arrive 30 min late. During this time we called multiples times - no answer. We then asked for a refund - he refused and become aggressive.

kayak-adventures-cape-town.author: Juba *Bravo Watch*
kayak-adventures-cape-town.text: We had an absolutely amazing kayaking experience with Kayak Adventures Cape Town, and a big part of that was thanks to our guide, Josh. From the very first time we arrived, everything was smooth and well-organized.

kayak-adventures-cape-town.author: Jean Hirst
kayak-adventures-cape-town.text: A great early morning experience! We had some good Kayak races on the way back. Lots of dolphins and stunning views of Table Mountain. Kayaks are also bright colors which makes for nice contrasting photos.

kayak-adventures-cape-town.author: michael anderson-cork
kayak-adventures-cape-town.text: Had a perfect morning out on the water for my anniversary. A very pleasant and easy kayaking trip with lots of beautiful views of Cape Town. We were able to see plenty dolphins up close. Josh and Rocky were excellent guides and they made the trip comfortable and friendly. Will 100% do again!

gravity-adventures.author: Vihaan Mathur
gravity-adventures.text: Charlie, Mikey, Wilson and Josh, absolutely fantastic guides! Thank you guys so much for making it such a memorable experience, it truly was unforgettable. Special shout out to the phenomenal food that these guys can cook, and how much fun we had throughout the experience.

gravity-adventures.author: Clara Powell
gravity-adventures.text: Our first river rafting experience on the magnificent Orange River was nothing short of unforgettable. It was hands down the most fun we’ve ever had as a group. What made it truly exceptional was the incredible Gravity team: Charlie, Mikey, Wilson, and Nkosi.

gravity-adventures.author: Dominic St George
gravity-adventures.text: Loved loved love our 5 days. One of the best things we have ever done as a family. Out guides, Nick, Wilson and Mikey were next level impressive. Kids adored them, super knowledgable, amazing cooks and rafting coaches …. Couldn’t have been more impressed.

shelley-point-kayaking.author: Tristin Badenhorst
shelley-point-kayaking.text: We had a lovely kayaking trip today! Billy was such a nice guide and knowledgeable when it comes to the sea. Safety is his top priority, which anyone would appreciate. He also takes photos throughout the trip and sends it to you afterwards. We went a bit past the lighthouse and saw some dolphins as well as a penguin!

shelley-point-kayaking.author: Paul Boguo
shelley-point-kayaking.text: Fantastic Kayaking experience with Billy and His team. It was such a joy spending time with them in the open water and they kept all information quite clear and concise. They took great care of myself and friends. I appreciate their services!

shelley-point-kayaking.author: Cam Levey
shelley-point-kayaking.text: Fantastic experience, all thanks to Billy. He accomodated Koda, our Golden Retriever, which was an incredible experience to share with him. Thanks for having us!

pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.author: Franky Jones
pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.text: Just like inviting us into a peace of ... well, peace... Calmness, beauty. Guided around every single rock, stopped for a swim and ending with the stars above us... My first ever "night" kayaking experience... Thank you Tanya and Dirkie. They are beautifully professional, great gear and wonderful guides. Absolutely loved it!!! ❤️

pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.author: Mazeeda Karani
pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.text: We had a great time, filled with stunning scenery throughout! Tanya guided us along a beautiful route; the waters were lovely, calm and easy to navigate. We took the 6am slot and even though it was quite misty, it made for a magical ambience.

pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.author: Shirley Luvalo
pura-vida-kayak-adventure-kleinmond.text: A beautiful experience we had with Pura Vida Kayak team. Upon booking the activity, we were nervous about trying this out. Since none of us in the group couldn’t swim. Tanya and Aadrian made us feel comfortable and confident to paddle in the water safely. Tanya took a lot of pictures of us while we were enjoying our Kayak moment….

bonamanzi-adventures.author: Ingrid Kjonstad
bonamanzi-adventures.text: Lovely place for a retreat or family getaway. Every thing you need for catering, well maintained pool and braai area

bonamanzi-adventures.author: denzel esau
bonamanzi-adventures.text: Best place ever. Everything you need is there. Spacious and beautiful. Could not have asked for a better venue

bonamanzi-adventures.author: Khaled Abdou
bonamanzi-adventures.text: Thank you Chris and the all family of Bonamanzi. We all have great time. Hope to see you soon..

aquatrails.author: Bronwen Barratt
aquatrails.text: Last week a friend and I rented a kayak from Aquatrails and paddled from Fish Hoek to Simonstown. The whole experience was extremely enjoyable and I will definitely be back soon. Hugh, the owner, was very kind and helpful.

aquatrails.author: Sarah Jones
aquatrails.text: It's great to be able to rent a kayak for the day and go on wonderful adventures. Kayaks are in good condition the owner is friendly and helpful. You can get all the gear you need from life jackets to waterproof bags for a phone. The only reason for a 4 star rating is the limited opening hours.

aquatrails.author: Michelle Ritchie & John Hammell
aquatrails.text: We took the kayak tour with a group of two adults, two teenagers, and two younger children. Everyone had a great time (and that's not always easy with this group!). Our guide, Ed, was fun and very knowledgeable. The 2.5 hour trip was relaxed and easy for the whole group to keep pace. We'll be back next year!

bitou-kayaks.author: Jeff C
bitou-kayaks.text: Fun two hours on the river and saw a variety of birdlife. Great for beginners and folks who like to do something different from the usual Garden Route sights. Many thanks to Lee who arranged everything for us on a day’s notice and Ross on site who cheerfully answered our questions about what to see and do as well as made sure we had a saf…

bitou-kayaks.author: richard bayley
bitou-kayaks.text: An excellent start to a Saturday: a detailed and enthused intro to the local flora and fauna from our host with some easy to follow instructions. A spellbindingly beautiful and quiet spot on a calm and cloudless day. I’ll be back.

bitou-kayaks.author: Janine Heyns
bitou-kayaks.text: We had a lovely hour’s trip along the river. Some of us spotted the Knysna Loeries and we heard a fish eagle in the distance. It’s a very peaceful activity to do. We booked via WhatsApp and Lee was very helpful. Luckily she gave us good directions as to how to get there - via the car park of Emily Moon.

supingkeurbooms.author: martie schnettler
supingkeurbooms.text: Awesomeness galore, spectacular scenery, skipper was so friendly and explained a lot of history to group

supingkeurbooms.author: Richard Dixon
supingkeurbooms.text: Very nice, clean, nice and clean camping, swimming, fishing and Ablution visality.

supingkeurbooms.author: Daleen Pommerel
supingkeurbooms.text: Awesome cruise with a wonderful informative skipper

kayak-paternoster.author: Danny Pyatt
kayak-paternoster.text: A Magical Sunrise Experience Waking up early was absolutely worth it to witness the sun rising over the still, glittering waters. The added bonus? Penguins perched on the rocks, dolphins hunting for fish, seals playfully leaping, and countless birds simply enjoying the morning.

kayak-paternoster.author: Tanya De Almeida
kayak-paternoster.text: Our guide Wayne, was an absolutely stellar guide. Extremely helpful,supportive, patient and knowledgeable. My team and I thoroughly enjoyed our time on the open waters of paternoster. I highly recommend their services.

kayak-paternoster.author: Pieter Smith
kayak-paternoster.text: Danie took us out for a morning kayaking tour of Paternoster. We really enjoyed the experience!

the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.author: Lara Samira
the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.text: We had an amazing experience with Dunes Beach Rides! The owner was incredibly friendly and even gave us great restaurant recommendations for after our ride, which we really appreciated. The staff were so kind and patient with the animals, and you could really see how much they care about them.

the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.author: Aluna Bubblegum
the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.text: Loved the experience of riding on the beach. Only cash payment makes you wonder where the money goes. No receipt. We didn’t like that they took 17017301 photos it felt like a ohptoshoot and they asked to make a heart with the fingers etc. would love a more natural approach.

the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.author: duaa hefne
the-dunes-beach-horse-rides.text: Horse riding at The Dunes was truly a magical experience! The beach was like a scene from a dream — soft white sand, turquoise waters, and endless dunes glowing under the sun. Riding along the shoreline with the sound of the waves beside us was pure serenity.

the-riding-centre.author: Cece Kearns
the-riding-centre.text: We recently attended a birthday party at The Riding Centre in Hout Bay, and it was absolutely fantastic! The staff were so friendly, organised, and amazing with the kids — patient, encouraging, and truly passionate about what they do.

the-riding-centre.author: Jade Morgan
the-riding-centre.text: Best location for a children's party hands down! Thank you. The team that run it are so professional. You can choose a package to suit your needs. They supplied glasses and ice buckets for kids and adults, bunting and balloons. They did the clean up afterwards. All the kids did not want to leave the party. We will definitely be back.

the-riding-centre.author: Insaaf Dawood (ThatMissDawood)
the-riding-centre.text: Lovely venue for a kids party. There are two separate party areas that are semi-enclosed. Each area has its own tent with the furniture you may need for a party, including a basin. A lovely touch was the "what I forgot box" which contained very useful items. There is also a braai area.

mountain-view-horse-trails.author: Jodie De Bruin
mountain-view-horse-trails.text: We’ve been taking our little 20-month-old daughter to Mountain View Horse Trails for pony rides and it has quickly become one of our absolute favourite outings. Our little girl has completely fallen in love with sweet Twinkle Toes, and asking to go see her has become a regular request in our home.

mountain-view-horse-trails.author: Razvan Grig
mountain-view-horse-trails.text: I had a great experinece there, the Host are very welcoming. You will find a clasic ranch with a lot of animals, horses are very well keept and for a rider this is the most important:). You will find there a lot of space to spend time in the nature, small shop and waiting area soft drinks/water and some snaks.

mountain-view-horse-trails.author: Lauren Ungerer
mountain-view-horse-trails.text: I had the absolute best time on this horse riding experience in the Durbanville area. I have riding experience, and I was genuinely impressed by how well trained, calm, and clearly loved these horses are. You can immediately see the care and respect they receive.

tniqua-stable-inn.author: Erwin van Asselt
tniqua-stable-inn.text: Had an excellent stay at T Niqua Stables. I stayed here for two nights with my father and everything was perfect. Since it was a quieter period, the atmosphere was very peaceful and relaxing. Werner and the owner were incredibly friendly, welcoming, and thoughtful throughout our stay.

tniqua-stable-inn.author: Sarah Heintz
tniqua-stable-inn.text: Our family had a fantastic stay at the guest house. It was the highlight of our Garden Route trip. Our spacious loft apartment was facing the horse paddock and we could even see the ocean. Our hosts made us feel welcome and we enjoyed the authentic South African dinner.

tniqua-stable-inn.author: SGR
tniqua-stable-inn.text: We would like to thank the host for giving us a warm welcome to their wonderful place just out of a fairy tale. Rooms are big and they make sure we are comfortable. Bettina even offered use of kitchen for cooking incase needed. The views from the property is breathtaking. They also offer horse riding incase needed.

heaven-and-earth-trails.author: Becky White
heaven-and-earth-trails.text: We rode the Exclusive Trail recently on our trip from Durban & had the best time! From apple & pear orchards, grape vineyards to protea fields every second was the most stunning scenery. Our guide, Best, was really knowledgeable and friendly & could answer every question we had about the farm.

heaven-and-earth-trails.author: Chelsea-Lee Brooks
heaven-and-earth-trails.text: Had the most amazing experience at Heaven and Earth Horse Trails! I took my mom and sister, who have never ridden before, and they absolutely loved it. The horses were so well cared for and calm — even at a trot they felt safe and confident. Our guide, Best was so patient, friendly, and made sure everyone was comfortable the entire time.

heaven-and-earth-trails.author: L Scott
heaven-and-earth-trails.text: Absolutely amazing, if I could rate better than 5/5 I would!! What an amazing trip through the orchards, up to the winery and then through fields of cows and other animals. I can’t recommend this enough, my favourite “tour” of South Africa to date!

kurland-park-horse-trails.author: Baylea Creed
kurland-park-horse-trails.text: We had an amazing time on our horse trail. We are on holiday from England and everybody at the ranch spoke great English and made us feel very welcome. The horses were well behaved and we felt safe at all times !

kurland-park-horse-trails.author: George Olivier
kurland-park-horse-trails.text: This was a solid horseback riding experience. There wasn't much interaction with the guide other than giving us basic instructions prior to the ride but it was perfect as it appeared that all of us had ridden before. The ride was lengthy over various types of terrain and the horses were well-behaved and in good shape.

kurland-park-horse-trails.author: Kyle Derrett
kurland-park-horse-trails.text: Fantastic experience, the Guide was vocal and I highly recommend for beginner riders. Riding in the forest was superb, nice touch riding through water streams.

pearly-beach-horse-trails.author: Kim Jonas
pearly-beach-horse-trails.text: We had the best experience horse riding with Pearly beach horse trails… Sarah made us feel so special and comfortable while ensuring that our horse riding experience is tops! We have never such a great experience elsewhere and the riding time is so plentiful, we rode until sunset for real!

pearly-beach-horse-trails.author: Silva Pelli
pearly-beach-horse-trails.text: I joined a day ride with two of my friends in February 2026 and cannot recommend this place enough! Most importantly, the welfare of the horses was clearly a top priority and all of them were fit, healthy and so happy with their jobs.

pearly-beach-horse-trails.author: Ekaterina Tsimbler
pearly-beach-horse-trails.text: This experience was truly outstanding and will stay in our hearts forever. From the very first moment, Sarah and her wonderful family made us feel incredibly welcome, calm, and completely safe. You can immediately feel how much love, care, and respect they have for their horses — they are beautiful, gentle, and so well looked after.

klein-karoo-horse-adventures.author: Suné Jordaan
klein-karoo-horse-adventures.text: Absolutely loved this horse riding experience! Well-trained horses, with a natural feel for the adventurous terrain. "Respek" most certainly deserves his name! What a charmer 🐎😉! The views across the Karoo were nothing short of breathtaking, topped with that kind of quiet that resets your soul.

klein-karoo-horse-adventures.author: Carl Martens
klein-karoo-horse-adventures.text: We had an amazing ride on the Kudu trail. Horses are well trained, energetic and the saddles comfortable! The guiding was excellent and my girls (9 and 11) were over the moon. The views were really something too… thanks for a great experience and hope to be back soon!

klein-karoo-horse-adventures.author: Robert Bruce Campbell
klein-karoo-horse-adventures.text: It was a brilliant guided horse back outing in the beauty of the karoo. The horses were well kept and really pleasant natured. The guide was very knowledgeable on each horses personality. I will recommend them any day!

cape-winelands-riding.author: Lauren Best
cape-winelands-riding.text: I did the 4-day Cape Winelands riding and wine-tasting tour and it was truly unforgettable. From start to finish, everything was seamlessly planned—I didn’t have to think about anything except enjoying myself. Louis, the owner, was absolutely wonderful.

cape-winelands-riding.author: Lauren Mee
cape-winelands-riding.text: Very pleased we picked this place. We did the 1.5hr tour and that was perfect. The guide was very friendly, as were the horses. Hubby had never been horse riding and thoroughly enjoyed it. We rode through neighbouring vineyards/orchards. Would recommend.

cape-winelands-riding.author: Jared Kochik
cape-winelands-riding.text: Great experience and outstanding value! We did the 3hr winetasting tour. Guides were very knowledgeable and friendly, the horses were calm and easy to ride for us beginners. The winery was amazing, we even bought some wine and olive oil and had it delivered to our house in the US. Big thanks to Louis, Marie and the entire staff!

silvermist-equestrian-center.author: Tyrone Gregory Ontong (Greg)
silvermist-equestrian-center.text: The weather was fairly mild making for a pleasant day, the site is located close to the Joostenbergvlakte. It was not easy to find, the signage is a bit on the small side. The arrivals space is well-appointed with some outdoor seating. Staff is very well-coming, helpful and knowledgeable.

silvermist-equestrian-center.author: Almari Helfrich
silvermist-equestrian-center.text: Such a friendly and disciplined environment for kids to get lessons. Very professional staff and gorgeous horses

silvermist-equestrian-center.author: Nicolette labuschagne
silvermist-equestrian-center.text: Always enjoy the shows here. Professional and well organized. Unfortanatly not alot of shade for the spectators so come prepared.

perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.author: Hilary Mitchell
perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.text: An incredible and unbelievable experience. All of the horses were in amazing condition, I own my own horse and wish she was as fit and healthy as the horses here. I went on a hack today and it was one of the best rides I've ever been on, we cantered through the forest and it was beautiful. Thank you for such a wonderful afternoon

perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.author: Ms Mindow
perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.text: Great experience! Amanda is such a wonderful guide. The horses are well looked after, shiny coats, and adorable. The horses are experienced, patient, and know the trail very well. As a first-time rider, you don't have to stress. Just enjoy the forest trail. Beautiful backdrop of mountains where the ride begins and ends. Thanks Amanda.

perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.author: Sulet Joubert
perdepoort-horse-trails-local-info-co-za.text: Enjoyed an incredible outride in the most beautiful indigenous forest. The horses were very well looked after and responsive. You can see they are loved and enjoy doing what they do. I can highly recommend this experience.

drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.author: Michelle Mitchell
drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.text: This was the highlight of our west coast holiday! We thoroughly enjoyed all aspects of the trail from the farm to the beach. The horses were also very good natured and gentle. A big thank you to Vicky for making the experience unforgettable!

drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.author: Loïc BRAIA
drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.text: Amazing experience with fantastic nature and beach, the horses are very friendly and gentle. The coach/tour guide was very attentive and explained everything to us. We had a great time thank you

drikus-horse-trails-paternoster.author: Emma Smith
