drakenstein-lion-park.text: Great experience overall. It’s pretty much a self-guided tour. You pay and just walk in. The feeding times are from 4 PM onwards, three days a week. You basically follow the workers and watch them feed the lions, which is really nice. Each lion enclosure has the name and backstory of the lion.

drakenstein-lion-park.author: Kristy Wilson
drakenstein-lion-park.text: What an amazing experience!! We stayed the night in the tented camp - Kayla was the best host and took such great care of us, the tent was clean and the beds comfortable! The Braai was delicious and the lions were so beautiful and well looked after, their stories were so sad but this park deeply care and look after them!

drakenstein-lion-park.author: Coll Swaney-Moore
drakenstein-lion-park.text: A really interesting day, we loved that all the rescued cats had large enclosures geared to make the cats happy not the visitors. A bit of patience and you will see them but after reading the history of each rescue you can accept why it's their choice to approach the visitors or not. The all look remarkably healthy and happy.

wiesenhof-adventure-park.author: Ilze Gouws
wiesenhof-adventure-park.text: We love it at Wiesenhof. Splash fun, jumping and loads of stuff for the kids. Places under the trees, people can braai and there's a shop if you'd like to buy. No issues if you take picnics along. The people are attentive and helpful. Kids always have amazing amounts of fun.

wiesenhof-adventure-park.author: Adeela Gadar
wiesenhof-adventure-park.text: I had an amazing time at the park . The weather was amazing. Sunny , bright and no wind. I didn't book the tickets in advance , I got the tickets there. Luckily there wasn't long queues and we entered quickly. As I got there by 10.30 so bought the day pass , however , half day pass is also available, you must confirm the time though.

wiesenhof-adventure-park.author: Sunel Visser
wiesenhof-adventure-park.text: Highly recommend!! Pools and slides for young and old. You can take your own gazebos, chairs, food and braai goodies. Entrance fee covers unlimited slides for the whole day. We went on a busy day during school holidays and were pleasantly surprised with the set-up and flow. No queues at the restaurant/shop and bathrooms.

le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.author: Lil mess
le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.text: We had such a great time! ➕ • super friendly and forthcoming staff • big enclosures for the crocodiles & many of the crocs • a great variety of snakes (the showing of the king snakes was very memorable) • kitchen was good (especially the croc filet) • generally nice location to sit down and have a coffee in • offer a variety of activities…

le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.author: Jonathan Murton
le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.text: Some huge crocks and the feeding was great to see. We did some fishing (catch and release) on the wooden deck with a beautiful view of the mountains. The guided tour was very enjoyable and quite a few reptiles to see. Food was really good as well. Pizzas were also great.

le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.author: Brendon “Apie89” Viljoen
le-bonheur-reptiles-and-adventures.text: One of the best crocodile sanctuaries I have visited, very reasonably priced and definitely worth stopping there. Bring your bathing suit in summer months for a cage diving experience

brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.author: Aleksandr P.
brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.text: A wonderful stay without the noise — Expectations vs. Reality We spent almost a week at Brenaissance Wine & Stud Estate and were very satisfied. Before booking, I was quite concerned about the reviews mentioning noisy weddings, but in reality, it was perfectly fine: we didn't hear any noise during our entire stay.

brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.author: Nick Collins
brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.text: Very nice rooms. Options for a cottage with full kitchen or rooms with a small refrigerator and tea/coffee facilities. Nice pool area, also where breakfast is served. Breakfast was good but a little disorganized. Better for couples than groups eating together. Nice country setting a few minutes from downtown.

brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.author: Paula Dobosz
brenaissance-wine-stud-estate.text: Our stay at Braneissance Hotel was simply perfect. The setting is incredibly green, calm, and quiet — surrounded by beautiful nature and animals that make you feel completely at peace. We enjoyed every moment, both during the day and at night.

clos-malverne-restaurant.author: Louise Wallace
clos-malverne-restaurant.text: We came on a rainy afternoon. The staff were lovely and very attentive. The setting was very nice as we sat on the balcony and was still bright and sheltered despite the bad weather.

clos-malverne-restaurant.author: Veronica Schnippenkotter
clos-malverne-restaurant.text: An absolutely 5 ⭐ experience. We popped in for lunch. I had THE most divine prosciutto pizza & hubby a perfect fillet 👌🏻 For dessert we had the ice cream & wine pairing. What a wonderful taste sensation 😁 Thank you Blake for your attention to detail, your impeccable service & knowledge. We had the most delightful afternoon.

clos-malverne-restaurant.author: Caroline le Roux
clos-malverne-restaurant.text: Decided to have an early lunch and found that the kitchen was not yet ready for service. The staff made us feel welcome and while we waited we indulged in the ice cream and wine pairing. What a treat; very different from what other wine tasting I've done. Food was excellent and we'll definitely return to try out other items.

minimax-cinema.author: Broadcasting
minimax-cinema.text: I have been to the cinema recently, after going there a long time ago. We went in a bit late, movie already started, so we get a quick popcorn and drinks. What a disappointment as the popcorn was probably the last scraps, it taste old, and small pieces of leftover.. hard and dry. Now you sit in the movie and can't even enjoy the popcorn.

minimax-cinema.author: Bevan Oliver
minimax-cinema.text: The staff is friendly and this place is really cool only that I feel that their should also play 3D movies more often than just than certain times

minimax-cinema.author: Lucas Milner
minimax-cinema.text: Great authentic cinema experience, well priced nothing too fancy.

franschhoek-cellar.author: Matthew Robinson
franschhoek-cellar.text: Great wine (especially the reds) and really good food (had the fried chicken sandwich and it was ample!). Enjoyed our visit. Very good service too!

franschhoek-cellar.author: Monique
franschhoek-cellar.text: This was our second stop of our Three region wine tour yesterday. This is such a beautiful relaxing Winery. We also had lunch at this stop. The food was fresh and well prepared, the wines were nice and paired well with the meals. The staff made sure that everyone was satisfied.

franschhoek-cellar.author: Rodrigo Barba
franschhoek-cellar.text: Restaurant with its own wine cellar and wines, a wide variety of whites, with fresh or more woody flavours to suit all tastes. A very well decorated, clean, comfortable place with friendly, attentive service that explains all the wines, especially during tastings, as I did, and tender, high-quality meat.

graceland-venues.author: Ghadeejah Williams
graceland-venues.text: Great outing for the kids. Very pricey but the Wikideal is totally worth it. The staff is friendly and accommodating. They cater for babies as well as bigger kids. There is a play area too. The water is extra cold.

graceland-venues.author: Laina Jordan
graceland-venues.text: We had a fantastic day out at Graceland – highly recommended! They limit capacity, so it never felt overcrowded. The facilities were clean and well maintained, with a good mix of pools for little ones and older kids. The slides were fun, there were lovely shady picnic spots, and the kitchen was reasonably priced.

graceland-venues.author: Leon De Jager
graceland-venues.text: Very child friendly with a bit of entertainment for adults. Parents will definitely have a fabulous time as they have fun with their kids however, single adults might feel bit board after 2 hours of being there.

cape-joy.author: Sydney Wessels
cape-joy.text: Great place for toddlers and the parents. Next level playplace with friendly helpfull staff. Pizzas are awesome and the drinks menu just perfect. Would definitely be coming here often. Well done 👏

cape-joy.author: Shirley Suen
cape-joy.text: Took the kids to Giga Park Cape Joy and they had a fantastic time. The play area is newly built, clean, and full of colourful activities that kept them busy for hours. The only downside is the limited food options, so it’s a good idea to eat beforehand or bring along some snacks.

cape-joy.author: Anzhelika Petrova
cape-joy.text: Cape Joy has officially become our new favorite spot! There’s an amazing playground for kids — huge, fun, and full of different zones: sand area, slides, automatic swings, giant building blocks, and so much more! While the little ones play, parents can relax with a wood-fired pizza 🍕 and a cold draft beer 🍺 — the perfect combo.

kids-factory.author: Gerome Mundy
kids-factory.text: Really a lovely family place. Plenty for the kids. Restaurant for the whole family... even sells beer for dad. Party venue with the best face painting I've ever seen. Usually it's a splat on..but this is beautiful.

kids-factory.author: Pareen Alexander
kids-factory.text: The menu is a little pricey, even with the portions being a bit on the smaller side. The quality is good though. Staff is helpful and friendly. Big play area, kids really do enjoy themselves as well. Don't plan to spend a long time there and the seating areas can be reserved. So you can be expected to be asked to make your way out.

kids-factory.author: Miquel Clarke
kids-factory.text: The place itself has very good facilities and a lovely bathroom and kitchen. The only reason for dropping 2 stars, is due to the unpleasant nature of the play attendants - young and old - they do not smile , do not communicate properly with the kids, do not greet when parents greet them, and portray their utter lack of desire to be there.…

neelsie-cinema.author: Anneline Arries
neelsie-cinema.text: Really good experience. You don't have to be a member to watch the films. What I like about the cinema is the R40 combo which is for your ticket and it includes a snack and drink of choice. There are also movie-marathons each month, which is great. Been here a few times and had overall good experiences.

neelsie-cinema.author: Margaux Lourens
neelsie-cinema.text: Friendly staff & very reasonable prices. Their barista makes the best coffees & drinks, & there's a great little seating area to hang out before the movie starts. Cinema is always very clean & neat, & a great selection of movies is always on offer.

neelsie-cinema.author: Liza Stewart
neelsie-cinema.text: Sadly I've had to change my old review, the place has been refurbished and all the charm that it once had has been stripped. There is no popcorn, no coffee and none of the previous atmosphere. The movies are no longer advertised on the outside and the place is empty and closed most of the time.

wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.author: Digital Dev
wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.text: Huge thank you to Wild Wild West for an unforgettable experience! My little ones had an absolute blast playing, and the staff were incredibly friendly and accommodating. The atmosphere was lively and fun, and the waffles and milk were a delicious treat! We can't wait to come back and play again! Recommend for families!

wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.author: Mari Carstens
wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.text: Had such a wonderful time, everything is looking clean and well maintained by the new owners and the menu and food is good! The hand-cut chips is perfect and the milkshakes really good. Attentive staff with the kids on the obstacles and at the tables. Definitely improved on the adult experience and the kids always have a blast.

wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.author: Desley Kiewiets
wild-wild-west-kids-play-park.text: Visited for the first time on Sunday with my 11 year old and 15month old. My 11 year old loved it, however the toddler area is EXTREMELY DISAPPOINTING 😞 The place could do with a revamp and upgrade.

gelato-lab-stellenbosch.author: Sara Ariel
gelato-lab-stellenbosch.text: Amazing service, people are friendly and will let you test some flavours before you buy. The decor is very cute and they have lots of flavours! I had the mango and litchi flavour and it was sooooo heavenly. Highly recommend!

gelato-lab-stellenbosch.author: Richard Hose
gelato-lab-stellenbosch.text: Very nice concept, attempting to bring the “lab” concept across. Enjoyed the Ice Cream & tried the chocolate coated sugar cone, BUT was somewhat let down by the taste of the bland fatty aftertaste of what tastes like baking chocolate.

gelato-lab-stellenbosch.author: Kim Hawes
gelato-lab-stellenbosch.text: Holy moley!! What an experience! I think we have found Gelato Heaven!! This is by far the best selection on gelato we have seen and the quality is perfect! We were served by a very friendly and helpful guide, to help us to make a choice of gelato. This place should be called Gelato Heaven!!!

kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.author: Juandri Supra
kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.text: Such a fun, happy place right here in Somerset West! The selection of artisan ice cream is absolutely awesome. The Pistachio is my personal favorite, super yummy and definitely a must-try. If you’re looking for a cheerful spot with incredible ice cream treats, this is it! 🍦 🍨

kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.author: melonie martin
kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.text: Kirsten's Somerset West, my favourite place.. I sometimes go twice a day... I know it's never a good thing when U eat to much ice cream. But I'm Inlove with the service, The Girls are so friendly. I adore them. They make everyone feel so happy and Welcome. I really love this place. Thank U Girls so much.

kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.author: Devison Kamanga
kristens-kick-ass-ice-cream-somerset-wes.text: Amazing ice cream. I had the pistachio and the cookies and cream. The pistachio is one of the best flavours of ice cream I've had in a long time. Not too sweet and just great. Can't wait to bring all my friends here next time.

dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.author: Marisa Botes
dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.text: What a roar-some day out! We visited Dino Kingdom - Dinosaur Theme Park & Party Venue today with our 3-year-old and 7-year-old, and they had the absolute best time. From exploring the life-sized dinosaurs and hunting for fossils in the sand to enjoying the rides, there was never a dull moment.

dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.author: Melissa Britz
dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.text: Wow I must say what a lovely place. I was amazed by the dinosaur that was here i was shocked on how this was done. Well done. Very worth visiting also for the small children to go have some fun. Something that has been brought back from history.

dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.author: Judith GBaBe
dino-kingdom-dinosaur-theme-park-party-v.text: Was very exciting to see the dinosaurs. Baby loved it. Ticket prices are bit too much tho. Even for kids its R200 for the Dino walk.

roar-around-play-park.author: Apryl Clark
roar-around-play-park.text: We visited Roar Around in Somerset West multiple times while travelling from the UK. My toddlers loved it! There are so many activities and climbing opportunities — both in the dedicated toddler area and in the larger play structure, which is fab for multiple ages.

roar-around-play-park.author: Carla Saul
roar-around-play-park.text: We had the most amazing experience with Roar Around for our son’s 4th birthday party! From start to finish, everything was fun, exciting, and so well organised. The kids had an absolute blast and didn’t stop smiling the whole day.

roar-around-play-park.author: Lorenzo Esau
roar-around-play-park.text: After working 8 days straight, today I was off and decided to spend some quality time with my princess. I saw a video of Roar Around on Facebook last night and decided to make a booking for 2 hours.

franschhoek-theatre.author: Grant Lynott
franschhoek-theatre.text: What a lovely evening! Absolutely fantastic movie and the venue is beautiful, clean, intimate and just wow. Really guys this is fantastic, also such a friendly and welcoming chap that looked after us. Will be back soon!

franschhoek-theatre.author: Simon Kelsall
franschhoek-theatre.text: We really enjoy coming here when we are in Franschoek. Beautiful little theatre, very comfortable seating. An excellent selection of films, some new releases as well as classics and the occasional talk. The price includes a glass of wine and on half price Friday's it's amazingly good value. Shame more people don't use it!

franschhoek-theatre.author: Melinda McCann
franschhoek-theatre.text: Quite pricey- 1/2 price viewings recommended! But arguably worth the cost. A lovely viewing experience (with complimentary glass of nice wine) with super-comfy seating, mini table space and fairly intimate feel. Bring your own popcorn/snacks- in a suitable (not noisy) container!

paarl-trails-laborie-estate.author: Björn Gelhorn
paarl-trails-laborie-estate.text: Really great company with a wonderful vision and mission. Do and Combine outdoor sport within the beautiful vineyards of some local wineries and the natures reserve of Paarl. Darren one of the owners welcomed us, handed over the bikes and let us exploring.

paarl-trails-laborie-estate.author: Nicom Loubser
paarl-trails-laborie-estate.text: Fast and efficient service. Helpful and knowledgable staff. The owner had locked up and was on his way, but opened up again and assisted me with a permit. Annual and day permits can be purchased here. Annual permits can be collected here as well. E-Bike rentals also available from here.

paarl-trails-laborie-estate.author: ss. mtb
paarl-trails-laborie-estate.text: Great trails, lovingly built and maintained, set in stunning scenery with fresh, cold beer at the finish. I was happy to buy a permit to support these trails. Rented a bike and it was nearly new, top end, and perfectly maintained.

hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.author: Alana Buchanan
hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.text: A great vibe here at Hudsons, Benet was the perfect host, the pizzas were awesome, great atmosphere to watch the Fulham football game. I had the Windhoek draught and the Jordan Estate Merlot - both delicious. Would come again for the papa johns pizza - pepperoni, caramelised garlic and feta - sensational combo!!

hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.author: Huub Van Rooij
hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.text: Let's start with the good news: their burgers are next level fingerlicking tasty. And the atmosphere is exuberant, no doubt caused by heaps of students just returned after summer break. But.... the service was abysmal. Nice young girls these students, surely, but completely clueless about working as a waiter.

hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.author: JP
hudsons-the-burger-joint-stellenbosch.text: Hudson’s absolutely delivered a 10/10 dining experience, and a huge part of that was our waiter Melo. From the moment we sat down, Melo was attentive, warm, and knowledgeable — he made great recommendations without being pushy and checked in at just the right times without hovering.

thirsty-scarecrow.author: LouisC
thirsty-scarecrow.text: The BIGGEST drinks selection anywhere in Cape Town or anywhere to be honest! Food was great, cocktails amazing, large variety local and international beers on tap and bottled, tons of cocktails, mixed drinks, shooters etc. Really lekker vibes, sitting outside was great on a sunny day. Service was great, very friendly staff!

thirsty-scarecrow.author: Suzanne Mostert
thirsty-scarecrow.text: What more can I say - a great couple running a great business with great staff and hearts of gold!! Kelly and Ivan not only care about their customers and their happy hearts, BUT THEY ARE ACTIVELY INVOLVED IN ANIMAL WELFARE BY BOOSTING GLEN-GRAZE RESCUE SANCTUARY AND THE RESCUES REGULARLY 🥇😍 Thank you for creating a space for families t…

thirsty-scarecrow.author: Kevin Barnes
thirsty-scarecrow.text: A really good experience overall. The waiters are friendly and efficient, and the menu offers a solid, well-thought-out selection. The food is well presented and thoroughly enjoyed — with the exception of the three German sausages, which didn’t quite hit the mark.

bossa-somerset-west.author: Theresa
bossa-somerset-west.text: Mondays at Bossa is a popuar time with burgers at a rediculous low price. The patty was a bit over cooked and dry but the service was friendly and ewe loved the atmosphere. There is a great playground for kids and it looks safe and fun.

bossa-somerset-west.author: D.Mushore Mushore
bossa-somerset-west.text: I was at Bossa Somerset West on Monday night, seated at Table 16, and had a wonderful experience. Jacob looked after us and provided outstanding service throughout the evening—friendly, attentive, and always one step ahead. A highlight of the night was watching him surprise a young girl at a nearby table with a birthday ice cream.

bossa-somerset-west.author: Robyn-Lee Harris
bossa-somerset-west.text: We had a lovely time here a while back. We watched the rugby indoor seating not too crowded and not too loud could still keep a conversation going. Had amazing food and lovely milkshakes. Pleasant experience and friendly management.

bossa-paarl.author: Adrian Fisher
bossa-paarl.text: Had the best service from Deon. The place was fully packed, and there was no space to fit us in to the main restuarant because we didnt book beforehand. They got us a space next to the bar and the barman Deon was our waiter. We received the BEST service ever. Well done Deon, keep up the good and friendly work my man.

Fantastic Experience at Bossa Paarl! I recently visited Bossa in Paarl and had an amazing experience from start to finish. The atmosphere is vibrant and welcoming, perfect for both casual get-togethers and special occasions. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made us feel right at home.

bossa-paarl.author: Laurentius De Bruijn
bossa-paarl.text: We had an amazing lunch at Bossa Paarl. It wasn’t very busy, which made the atmosphere relaxed and enjoyable. The staff were friendly and welcoming, and the food was absolutely delicious. The children loved the play area, which made the experience even better for the whole family. Definitely a place we’ll visit again!

fancy-franks-somerset-west.author: Larochelle Van der Vyver
fancy-franks-somerset-west.text: Vibe (noise level, comfort, service, crowd): Fancy Frank’s has proper bar style vibes with a big space and lots of seating, so it works for both casual meetups and bigger groups. During the day it’s pretty chilled, but it can get very loud when they have evening events on.

fancy-franks-somerset-west.author: Elizabeth Pike
fancy-franks-somerset-west.text: Our waiter, Nyasha, was absolutely fantastic! His vibe was immaculate, his service was exceptional, and he made our entire experience so enjoyable. He was friendly, attentive, and brought such great energy to our table. We had such a good time thanks to him. Give Nyasha a raise! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

fancy-franks-somerset-west.author: Bernard Spies
fancy-franks-somerset-west.text: I recently visited Fancy Frank’s with colleagues, and it turned out to be a great choice for a work get-together. The atmosphere is vibrant, modern, and relaxed—perfect for socialising while still being comfortable enough to have proper conversations.

aandklas-stellenbosch.author: Nadine Khotoo
aandklas-stellenbosch.text: Aandklas is the place to be. The music and atmosphere was amazing. The food was so delicious and so affordable. The drinks were so affordable or cheap for that matter. My friends and I have a great time without breaking the budget. We ordered 2 large pizzas, cocktails and lots of shots after each other. Danced the night away.

aandklas-stellenbosch.author: Kyle
aandklas-stellenbosch.text: Extremely unfriendly bartenders. I must've waited 5 minutes to be served while 3 bartenders were on shift. I was standing with my card in my hand to signal i wanted to order and there were very few people at the bar. Mind you, i have no problems waiting at a bar for my turn when its full its no trouble at all but this was excessive.

aandklas-stellenbosch.author: Marlo Quells
aandklas-stellenbosch.text: To be honest, my phone got stolen here, so I'm a bit biased against Aandklas, but it's a great LGBT+ hangout and karaoke bar. They make good cocktails and have a wide selection of drinks. The bathrooms are tight. Iconic local spot.

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.author: Judith GBaBe
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.text: Definitely my new favourite spot in paarl. They were so busy but the service was OUTSTANDING. Thank you Ronnie! I thought we were going to wait long for our drinks or food since the place was full. But not at all. Amazing amazing amazing. Tasty food 10/10 👏🏾💯 I have ZERO complaints Perfect spot for dates. Warm and cosy.

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.author: Caroline le Roux
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.text: We didn't have a reservation and place was fairly busy, but we were shown to our table immediately. The waiter was super friendly and helpful. When my Camembert starter arrived it was not to satisfaction and he noticed this. I didn't need to complain, he returned it to the kitchen and brought out a new starter.

jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.author: Carla Steyn
jackson-and-black-grill-pizzeria-paarl.text: I had an absolutely wonderful experience at Jackson & Black in Paarl. From the moment we arrived, we were warmly greeted by the lovely lady at the front desk and escorted to our table, which made us feel welcome right away. Our waiter, Shinguy, was exceptional!

tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.author: Tammy Weatherby
tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.text: My husband, two friends, and I stopped by TukTuk for dinner and had a great experience. We were able to look over the menu beforehand, which made deciding easy, and we were seated right away when we arrived. For starters, we ordered the Samoosas and the Nachos for One to share.

tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.author: Flavius
tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.text: A cozy place to spend the evening time in Franschhoek. Friendly staff and cool amazing beer tasting experience. The Fish and Chips are one of the best I've ever eaten. The place and terrace is full of people every evening. Sometimes you have to wait for a table, but this is good, because you will not be disappointed a bit.

tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.author: Olivia Gouws
tuk-tuk-microbrewery-bistro.text: Lovely place to visit. The food is fresh and beautifully presented. All the staff are friendly, service is fast and spot on. Great place to relax and try different flavours.

balboa-balcony-bar.author: Vanessa Geldenhuys
balboa-balcony-bar.text: Great live music. Very good service. Love the pizzas. And no under 23 year olds which makes it even better in a student town like Stellenbosch. The owner is frequently there and always friendly. It is on the second floor and the tree tops is all along the window. Decor very stylish.

balboa-balcony-bar.author: Lauren Adams
balboa-balcony-bar.text: The food is amazing!! I really enjoyed the live band - Hugo Veldsman trio. Our waitress I think her name was Mari was amazing and attentive and so friendly. I cannot wait to come back again.

balboa-balcony-bar.author: Rmak
balboa-balcony-bar.text: Enjoyed our evening at balboa, the staff were all very friendly and helpful. The atmosphere was great and crowd was mature. In this part of stellenbosch its hard to find a place that isnt full of young uni students, so balboa is such a great place for older people looking for a good night out.

hennies-somerset-west.author: Kyle Hartzenberg
hennies-somerset-west.text: What a fantastic evening at Hennie's Somerset West! We went for their Tuesday quiz night and had an absolute blast. The quiz host kept the energy high, the questions were fun and varied, and the atmosphere was buzzing all night. Definitely one of the better quiz nights in Somerset West.

hennies-somerset-west.author: Hugo Strydom
hennies-somerset-west.text: Hennie’s Somerset Mall, Exactly where a person should be anytime. Hennie’s has become my go to and for good reason. The atmosphere hits that sweet spot between lively sports bar and relaxed family restaurant , big screens everywhere, great energy, but never overwhelming.

hennies-somerset-west.author: Karien Burger
hennies-somerset-west.text: The MC 10/10 The Quiz 10/10 The service 10\10 This was my second time taking part in the Hennie’s Quiz. It was even better than last time🥹 Honestly I want to win the hat, BUT I just really love Hennie’s🤍 I will come back EVERY SINGLE TIME Dankie Hennie’s🤍

blacksmiths-kitchen.author: Monique Botha
blacksmiths-kitchen.text: Food service is slow. Margarita Pizza's cheese was like plastic. No flavor at all. Some at the table had finished eating before other's received their food. Pizza base is super thin. My food was disappointing. For such a beautiful venue and amazing views, the food and service was a let down.

blacksmiths-kitchen.author: Juanita Maqwara
blacksmiths-kitchen.text: What a beautiful lunch we had this past Saturday, staff were amazing and the food👌👌👌 The views??? Immaculate 🥰🥰🥰

blacksmiths-kitchen.author: R J v Rensburg
blacksmiths-kitchen.text: Had the cob special of the day with fried calamari. Excellent. Good food and a nice view of the vinyards. The only thing that I can fault them on is acoustics of the building, noise cancellation will help in the roof. Other than that, the food is good quality and the service was good too.

ejs-sports-pub-grill.author: Rochelle Adams
ejs-sports-pub-grill.text: Gorgeous spot and I bet the night activities are lekker. But for breakfast: ordered full breakfast, got no beans/tomato “no stock”, only Ricoffee, and the place reeked of last night’s smoke + alcohol. Beautiful place, but I won’t be back for breakfast.

ejs-sports-pub-grill.author: Angie ******
ejs-sports-pub-grill.text: They used to serve the best and affordable food but now they only do pizzas 😔 On which I cant comment because I did not order their pizzas yet. My husband bought a beer and after drinking it half way through, we noticed that the date on the bottel had expired a few months back.

ejs-sports-pub-grill.author: Jaco Kruger
ejs-sports-pub-grill.text: Never will I eat a pizza without Biltong!!!

stellenbosch-flying-club.author: Anneline Arries
stellenbosch-flying-club.text: Had a really pleasant time, great food and great atmosphere. The food was good-portioned and delicious. I had both The Hulk and Ribs and Chips basket and enjoyed them so much. Really loved the tangy sauce the ribs were basted in.

stellenbosch-flying-club.author: michelle banwell
stellenbosch-flying-club.text: It’s a pity that the service is almost comically non-existent, because the setting is great and the food was good. Unfortunately, waiting over 30 minutes to get a drink (despite asking at the bar multiple times) and have the previous guests’ dirty plates cleared from the table where we were told to sit and spending almost 2 hours waiting…

stellenbosch-flying-club.author: Anton Stoltz
stellenbosch-flying-club.text: Love sitting at the restaurant and watching the planes & helicopters taking off & landing. Great food, value for money, great atmosphere, stunning views over the Stellenbosch mountains.

triggerfish-brewing.author: Charne Rossouw
triggerfish-brewing.text: We had a lovely time, we tried some beers and enjoyed amazing burgers. Our dog had some fish, it smelled really good. I'm definitely going back to try the fish. Our server was very friendly and helpful.

triggerfish-brewing.author: David Apter
triggerfish-brewing.text: This brewery is not to be missed if you are serious about beer! Great venue in a historic building. Good for a group party. Laid back and very casual atmosphere.

triggerfish-brewing.author: Elma
triggerfish-brewing.text: I have been to the market here before and recently I met a friend here for help with a laptop problem on a Wednesday afternoon. Pleasantly surprised by the lovely, homely atmosphere and friendly staff. We only had drinks but I will definitely be back to eat here. Food at tables around us looked amazing.

blues-groove-lounge.author: Michelle Rossouw
blues-groove-lounge.text: I've seen a number of shows here and have always had a good time. The food is good and reasonably priced. They have amazing chicken strips and super soft calamari. Pizza is always a hit! Various specials available during the week. Bathrooms are usually clean and neat.

blues-groove-lounge.author: Willem Smit
blues-groove-lounge.text: Excellent bar that has beer on tap and great specials. It is very spacious inside. The interior is beautiful and the staff are also friendly. We watched soccer and cricket before we played some pool. The ambiance was good and made me feel welcome. Highly recommend!

blues-groove-lounge.author: Celeste Storey
blues-groove-lounge.text: Hidden away in the industrial area Springbok Blues has got a nice chilled atmosphere. The interior is casual with dim lighting and very relaxing background music. They support local musicians by doing live shows every Friday evening. Come and support local music. The staff are very friendly and helpful.

proof-bar.author: Lusinda Beukes
proof-bar.text: Oh goody!! I just came from this wonderful bar and couldn't wait to post a review!! I absolutely loved the whole experience!! The decor is old school,smart and classic! Im an old soul so this absolutely fit my personality..no loud music.the staff was so friendly and helpfull our server explained the cocktails I ordered which was so tasty.…

proof-bar.author: Nkina Ramonyai
proof-bar.text: This is actually a wine bar with the most beautiful interior inside. Their menu consisted of mostly pizzas and they are very delicious. I had the meaty pizza with extra toppings of avocado and olive. Definitely mouth watering! If you are a pizza love then this is a right place for you. You can actually create your own pizza from scratch.

proof-bar.author: Simon “Scientist” Broadley
proof-bar.text: We stopped in here on our way back to Tokai from Botriver on a Saturday afternoon. Cool decor, and an even cooler server made the experience perfect. There were only a couple of other tables occupied. We had some refreshments and a delicious pizza. The welcome drink for us first timers was a nice surprise!

grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.author: Anlé Britz
grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.text: Ending on a high, surrounded by magnificent trees and sculptures, this stop brings the entire energetic trip to a perfect close. We savoured Angel’s Tears, a beautifully delicate wine named for the fine droplets that form naturally on the bottles during maturation - a subtle nod to nature’s artistry and patience.

grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.author: Preston Masimala
grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.text: Beautiful farm with a relaxing atmosphere. Thank you for a wonderful afternoon well spent. The staff were very nice, friendly, well prepared, and professional. I would especially like to emphasize Letitia, who truly goes above and beyond to make sure our afternoon was amazing. Thank you, Letitia, for your kindness and warm hospitality.

grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.author: Rob Bancroft
grande-provence-wine-tasting-room.text: A friend recommended this estate to us. We didn’t do a wine tasting but the place was great for kids with the large play area and the food was delicious. We ordered the burger and the line fish as well as the squids.

suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.author: Yolanda
suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.text: Suzanne - Coffee to Cocktails at La Borie is such a lovely spot to visit. The atmosphere is relaxed yet stylish, perfect for meeting friends or enjoying a quiet moment. Their breakfast is delicious, beautifully presented and full of flavour, and the deli selection is just as impressive - fresh, tempting, and perfect for a light bite or ta…

suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.author: Rolene Naffouj
suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.text: We had lunch at Suzanne’s! So happy we finally made our way to Laborie! Service was amazing. Our waiter was attentive. Our food was amazing, and drinks too! One of the best pizzas we’ve had!

suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.author: Shirley Suen
suzanne-coffee-to-cocktails.text: Visited Suzanne, Coffee and Cocktails and really liked the relaxed vibe. They have a wide selection of drinks, from good coffee to plenty of cocktails, and they stay open until 9 pm. The outdoor area is a nice touch—bean bags on the lawn where kids can lounge and play while adults unwind. A great spot for both families and friends.

nu-bar-somerset-west.author: Stutse
nu-bar-somerset-west.text: Entry fee but there are no proper DJs or appearances from well known artist. Why pay entry fee?? And. I still have to go in and pay more money for drinks.

nu-bar-somerset-west.author: Lola
nu-bar-somerset-west.text: Hidden away in the middle of Somerset West. Definitely a dark spot to just be out late, closing @ 04h30am which is uncommon. Safe and security present. First time visit. Good selection of music. Not over priced, lekker in die Helderberg ✌️

nu-bar-somerset-west.author: TrioSolar
nu-bar-somerset-west.text: A friend pays for three admissions, but two people aren't let in for no apparent reason. There's no refund. Security makes up its own rules. Why don’t I get a receipt for the admission? Now I have nothing, and neither does SARS. Best regards from SARS—I don’t think this will go well for long. They’ve already announced a tax audit.

soul-barrel-brewing.author: Franco Austin
soul-barrel-brewing.text: I have driven pas The Simondium Guild multiple times, always saw the sign for Soul Barrel Brewing, you know it is one of those things, I want to visit, never have the time or it means you have to get out of the rush of cars and actually turn off the main road.

soul-barrel-brewing.author: Lukie Snyman
soul-barrel-brewing.text: Am so glad a place like this exists!! Magnificent microbrewery creating exciting beers that challenges the norms of normal beer drinkers!

soul-barrel-brewing.author: Daniel Seha
soul-barrel-brewing.text: Great beer. Lekker atmosphere and music. Dog friendly. Great way to spend an afternoon with friends. Pizza was not bad, not amazing. Worth the visit to this off the beaten path more quaint brewery.

yollys.author: Sara Gaviria Álvarez
yollys.text: A must-visit in Franschhoek. We stumbled upon this place by chance and it ended up being one of the highlights of our 10-day trip through South Africa. From the moment you sit down and read the menu, you can feel the love and warmth with which this place was made.

yollys.author: Lui Oliveira
yollys.text: A hidden gem in South Africa that captivates with its authenticity. It is a welcoming place where the focus is honest, high-quality food prepared with genuine care. The owner and the staff dedication is evident in every detail, from the comfortable atmosphere to the attentive service.

yollys.author: Maya Linter
yollys.text: Had such a lovely experience here the food and wine were amazing, as was the service. The conveyer with the cheese was very cool. Thank you for looking after us !!

crown-bar.author: Christiaan Fourie
crown-bar.text: The waitress was trying her best but the manager/owner wasn't a tad friendly. Won't help us with the pool table as it's a rental. Drinks are not great, with almost no options but brandy or rum. And it's a bar without any on-tap beers, a little dirty as well.

crown-bar.author: Dean Dannhauser
crown-bar.text: Crown bar not wat it used to be, went there for the first time in many years.. Heavily overpriced and it lost its touch... This is so sad as it was one of the best pubs on Paarl

crown-bar.author: Tinus Bekker
crown-bar.text: Not the friendliest service in town

die-afdak-pub.author: Danie Van Rhijn
die-afdak-pub.text: They don't sell food but have a cost little place to have a drunk and play some pool. We have a dart club that comes on a Sunday to practice and do some social dart playing. We love it there. David is our friendly barman and makes us feel at home. The rest of the staff are also great.

die-afdak-pub.author: Andries
die-afdak-pub.text: We Decided to pop in for a quick Beer last night as there were still cars parked infront of the pub but were told that the Bar was closed. There were still people sitting inside and people playing pool and this was 23:20 pm Tuesday night 2/12/2025 and according to their times they close at 12 am wich means that there was still enough time…

die-afdak-pub.author: Willem Smit
die-afdak-pub.text: Great local pub with good vibes. Always play a bit of darts and pool while drinking a cold bezza.

old-road-wine-co.author: Anlé Britz
old-road-wine-co.text: Chenin and Syrah tastings lined up in a perfect parade - glass after glass of character, depth, and discovery. The vibe was lively, and as the sun began to set, the chatter rose with it - stories flowing as easily as the wine. The service was passionate, making every pour feel intentional and every recommendation worth listening to.

old-road-wine-co.author: Keasher Fraser
old-road-wine-co.text: Food was amazing. Service was excellent. Our waiter was so passionate, professional, and well-mannered. I asked her for her name - Caryn Morgan. She welcomed us with a bright smile and we immediately felt comfortable. She is definitely fit for working in this industry. God bless you Caryn !! Thanks for today.

old-road-wine-co.author: Wayne Graham
old-road-wine-co.text: Attentive and friendly staff. Very much catering to hop-on and off tram crowd but good enough for a quick tasting or pizza. No overly impressive wines and mostly overpriced everything by the bottle and in the curio shop. Worth a visit but not a stay if you’re a local with only ZAR to spend

moonshine-tavern.author: JB Bekker
moonshine-tavern.text: Moonshine Tavern is a true hidden gem with a rustic, local atmosphere that feels both quaint and personal. It’s the perfect spot to unwind after a long day, offering a cozy pub vibe where you can enjoy a cold beverage and relax with friends.

moonshine-tavern.author: Michael Rubens
moonshine-tavern.text: Very friendly, food was great. Loved the three dogs that belong to the owners

sportsmen-tavern.author: Megan Barnard
sportsmen-tavern.text: A visitor/supporter of this bar for almost a year, I have to share my experience today: I love to play pool and today, we were thrown out of this bar, because I tried to pet a black Cocker spaniel that slipped behind the bar and I followed her about 1m behind the bar. Expecting to be accepted, being a regular, I was chased out.

sportsmen-tavern.author: Matthew Gallant
sportsmen-tavern.text: Place have a very pleasant atmosphere. There is a very good vibe. The bar men are very friendly and accommodating. The people that visit the place are like a big happy family and treat every one as a member of the family. 👍🏼👍🏼

squirrel-inn.author: Rob Harding
squirrel-inn.text: We had a biker jol there hosted by my club, the MOTHS. It was great and we had the perfect hosts at a perfect venue.

squirrel-inn.author: Amanda Fraser
squirrel-inn.text: Amazing staff, performs well under pressure, bathrooms immaculate, well stocked bar

squirrel-inn.author: Danie B.
squirrel-inn.text: Enjoyed my first visit. The vodka special, for some reason, does not get my buzz going... Otherwise. Lekker vibe. Recommend visit for a real pub vibe.

picado-social-bar-cuisine.author: Darryl Lopes
picado-social-bar-cuisine.text: Great prego roll and good steak and egg special.

picado-social-bar-cuisine.author: Tertius Smit
picado-social-bar-cuisine.text: Love this place. Great people, great beer (Super Bock) and great view of the main road from the stoep.

picado-social-bar-cuisine.author: John Offen
picado-social-bar-cuisine.text: Outstanding place. Great vibe and excellent food. Thanks guys!!!

the-mad-hatter-pub.author: canyoudoanybetter
the-mad-hatter-pub.text: This is a great Pub. Sometimes you’re just feeling like pub food and this place has it. Casual, reasonably priced, indoor and outdoor seating in an enclosed patio area. Very nice staff and a cool looking fully stocked bar. I had a delicious cheeseburger 🍔 which came with fries and a side salad.

the-mad-hatter-pub.author: Lindie Hugo
the-mad-hatter-pub.text: Very cute cozy bar & restaurant. Food was delicious. Atmosphere was also very nice. Would definitely be going back. We had a lovely time. Service was tops and staff was friendly. 10/10 for this place.

the-mad-hatter-pub.author: FairlyChaotic
the-mad-hatter-pub.text: We went for lunch, think dinner would've been more of a vibe. Food taste bit on the basic side (prob best if your drinking) The desert sundae is a must try.

colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.author: J C
colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.text: Booked a wine tasting at this small winery which only produces sparkling wine. We went for Option 2 - 3 Colmant Cap Classique & 2 imported champagnes for comparison. Small tasting room although there is outdoor seating for when it is not raining. Excellent explanation of the sparkling wines & generous servings.

colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.author: Atul Vashistha
colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.text: Gorgeous wines and even more gorgeous views. We enjoyed the tasting and for the rest of the trip, kept order their sparking wines at our meals.

colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.author: Sara F
colmant-cap-classique-and-champagne.text: We did the tasting at colmant, it’s not bad but I wouldn’t recommend it as there are so many other choices in the area and better ones for cap classique. None of the 3 available to taste were exceptional

the-wine-hive.author: Lisa Harlow
the-wine-hive.text: Had lunch at the Wine Hive with a friend, the start of our weekend in Paarl. On the Main Street but plenty of parking outside. The pizzas are very good! We chose two and shared. They are quite happy for you to pick any bottle off the shelf and open it, just for a glass or two but we ended up drinking to whole bottle!

the-wine-hive.author: Carol Burgess
the-wine-hive.text: Best pizza! Michaela is a fabulous host and made us so welcome Great selection of wine and the pizzas are amazing, no soggy bottoms and perfectly crispy with a great choice of toppings Love the decor too and we will be back

the-wine-hive.author: Franli Kriek
the-wine-hive.text: Best pizza in town!! Highly recommend. The only thing is the service is a bit slow and the Aperol Spirits is only half a glass, will enjoy a full Aperol more!

corner-pocket-lounge.author: Divine Nubgwà
corner-pocket-lounge.text: Wow what a nice n safe place to chill their services are so nice from the floor to the management

corner-pocket-lounge.author: Mbulelo Ngubentombi
corner-pocket-lounge.text: Beautiful atmosphere and very busy, again the space issue. I wish they can expand

corner-pocket-lounge.author: Mark Backhouse
corner-pocket-lounge.text: Plays music to 1am so loud not considering neighbourhood

the-funky-buddha-paarl.author: Iqrah Wyngaard
the-funky-buddha-paarl.text: Coming all the way from CPT to Paarl is a decision I don't regret making. Funky Buddha definitely the place to be🥰

the-funky-buddha-paarl.author: Albert Mcalister
the-funky-buddha-paarl.text: Best of the best to chillax,have fun en be save ...💪💪👍👍👌

the-funky-buddha-paarl.author: Christiaan Heyns
the-funky-buddha-paarl.text: I have absolutely no idea how you've managed this review on google. What I've just experienced was mind blowing. Order confirmation:17:42 "Funky meal CHICKEN burger special" Order arrives 19:15, Cold and inside we find BEEF burgers.

boudoir-lounge.author: Carmen Aploon
boudoir-lounge.text: Loved the vibe, good was absolutely delicious, service was outstanding, DJ was on point.....will definitely go there again.

boudoir-lounge.author: Morgan Wildschut
boudoir-lounge.text: Vibes were great overall! The music was on point for most of the night, and the energy in the club was solid. But I’ve got to be real, the DJ started to lose the crowd toward closing time, which was a bit disappointing. Also, refreshments ran out midway through the night, which was a letdown, but we still managed to have a good time.

boudoir-lounge.author: Meagen Solomons
boudoir-lounge.text: Nice vibe space bit small need more seating but music selection on point parking enough food nice

mcgavins-pub.author: sheldon poisson
mcgavins-pub.text: I was reluctant to enter this pub that looked like a tiny forgettable establishment in the middle of nowhere, boy was I wrong. After a few visits elsewhere I decided to pop in for a final toot that ended up as a memorable evening.

mcgavins-pub.author: Edwin Hodkinson
mcgavins-pub.text: Just a small one length pub, with no view of the outside. Fairly noisy with the Strand Main Road running right alongside. It's a Sport's Pub so expect to be watching sports on the Flat Screen. Almost a gambling haven as the Gambling Machines enclosed in a glass cubicle can be clearly visible.

mcgavins-pub.author: Marco Worship
mcgavins-pub.text: For such a small space of a pub it was the most heart filling place I have ever been. It's all about family and friends here. You can come and braai your own meat without cost and enjoy a wonderfull time between friends. It has been running for more then 30 years.

pajamas-and-jam-eatery.author: CJ Lange
pajamas-and-jam-eatery.text: Such a unique spot and definitely worth a visit! Pajamas and Jam Eatery has an incredible selection of pastries and baked treats, along with a great variety of meal choices that all seem to have their own creative twist. The décor is an experience on its own.

pajamas-and-jam-eatery.author: sIIcAnton
pajamas-and-jam-eatery.text: Friends introduced us to this place and it was a total revelation. We were blown away and loved the energy of the space. The team is beyond exceptional and truly heartfelt. We always felt so welcome during our time there. As for the food, it is excellent and everything we tried was delicious. We are one hundred percent going back.

pajamas-and-jam-eatery.author: David Smythe
pajamas-and-jam-eatery.text: Went on the advice of friends. The parking was a bit of a problem, but we found one eventually. We were greeted as we entered, and asked to wait in an adjoining room as no tables were available. We waited a while but there is plenty to see while waiting.

java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.author: Shane Lewin
java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.text: Update: As a loyal customer to this place, via uber eats and presence at the cafe for over 6 years, what a response from the assumed owner!!! The owner is welcome to contact me, but my review stands! In fact, I was there yesterday, prove me wrong! A lovely place and genuinely a good atmosphere.

java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.author: Carl van Niekerk
java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.text: Great street side cafe and restaurant. Beautiful location and wonderful atmosphere. The food is great. Highly recommend. Go early so you can find a great table right on the street. Enjoy your breakfast and coffee while you watch the world go by. Prices are great.

java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.author: Kuhle Bija
java-cafe-bistro-stellenbosch.text: Java Bistro is a solid Stellenbosch spot with both indoor and outdoor seating. It stays busy during lunch, so expect a lively atmosphere, though it quiets down significantly in the afternoon for a more relaxed vibe.

vendettas-pizzeria.author: Candy 950
vendettas-pizzeria.text: Katie provided outstanding service at Vendettas Pizzeria. She was friendly, attentive, and made us feel welcome from the moment we arrived. She checked in regularly without being intrusive, made sure our order was perfect, and had a positive attitude throughout our visit.

vendettas-pizzeria.author: Fran and Mike
vendettas-pizzeria.text: Great meal at Vendetta Pizzeria. A warm welcome by “ the front man” and our waitress Katie was perfect. Delicious food. Easy menu to order from and chefs very adaptable. Great value for money. Lovely place with a lively vibe. Highly recommend.

vendettas-pizzeria.author: Matt B
vendettas-pizzeria.text: Beautiful setting in a lush courtyard with tables underneath the tree and water vapour from vents. Service was quick, efficient and friendly, no problem getting a table but we almost reserved online in advance. Bruschetta was lovely and filling, the balsamic sauce was really nice and sweet.

the-palms-restaurant.author: Megan Van Zyl
the-palms-restaurant.text: Today's experience at Palms Pub and Grill was honestly extremely disappointing. We have eaten here before on numerous occasions and always enjoyed the food, which is why this visit was such a let-down. From the start, things were off. The hot chocolate tasted like straight powder — you could literally feel and taste it in your mouth.

the-palms-restaurant.author: Jacques Van Zyl
the-palms-restaurant.text: We went to Palms on the 8th of July 2026. Firstly, there was no-one in front to provide assistance. We didn't know where to go. I asked the first person on-site for assistance and asked about where we go for the restaurant. The person juut said the entire place is the Palms and didn't say anything else.

the-palms-restaurant.author: Reon Da Costa
the-palms-restaurant.text: My friends and I visited The Palms over the weekend, and unfortunately, the experience was quite disappointing. Some of the bar staff displayed a rather cheeky and unprofessional attitude, which set a negative tone early on.

bossa-stellenbosch.author: Nathan Cox
bossa-stellenbosch.text: Great meal! Food was delicious! Our servers were great had great chat with us. Would definitely recommend! We didn't get the pizza but would love too come back and get some! Dessert was banging!

bossa-stellenbosch.author: Rico Fourie
bossa-stellenbosch.text: Love the food and selections they have! Almost every pizza and burger that I’ve had there was very tasty, fresh and top quality. I highly recommend their milkshakes too. I also love that their pizza’s can gluten and dairy free too (at an extra fee of course). The service is good, but management could be a little bit friendlier.

bossa-stellenbosch.author: William Marshall
bossa-stellenbosch.text: Bossa Pan Burger hit the spot! Juicy patty, great toppings, and a soft bun. The flavors came together well, and the portion was generous. A solid burger that satisfied my cravings. Good job, Bossa, Will definitely come back for more! Thanks again for the great service.

potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.author: Peter Chong
potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.text: A modern little farm stall and I would say the best in Kalpmuts. Although it doesn't offer the city standard service and quality of food, but it does have the local Klapmuts authenticity that locals and travelers enjoy pitstopping. The deli has a selection of pantries and bakes bread to tarts.

potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.author: Pauline van de venter
potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.text: A trip to Stellenbosch area is never completed without stopping at Potbelly. The best bakkery in the country!! A selection of delicious pastries, very good coffee and for those favouring savoury bites, a variety of homemade pies! The deli is stocked with various fresh produce....veggies, fruit, meat, preservatives and many more!

potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.author: Gerrit Vermeulen
potbelly-coffee-shop-and-bakery.text: The definition of a hidden gem. We had a lovely quiet lunch here. The pies are delicious, the prices are very reasonable, even cheap by Cape Town standards. The selection of pastries is fantastic. We tried the Malva Milk Tart and it was a true delight.

la-pineta.author: Justin Dollie
la-pineta.text: This place is awesome for sunset drinks and pizza, especially if you have kids who can play in the big playground. The food looks great, but it's pretty bland once you actually eat it. Considering the price, we left feeling pretty underwhelmed with the overall experience.

la-pineta.author: Lucinda De Waal
la-pineta.text: We had a REALLY lovely first experience here. My husband and I brought our 2 year old along, and BOY did she enjoy the beautiful play area. I am really surprised we haven’t heard of this beautiful place sooner ?

la-pineta.author: Simon Robinson
la-pineta.text: My family and myself love coming to La Pineta! We must have been here 5 or 6 times over the past couple years for birthdays or other celebrations. Everything has been consistently enjoyable across all our visits. The service has been friendly, the food has been delicious!

saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.author: Eugene Roux
saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.text: We had an absolute great experience again at one of of favourite eating venues. It's been a while since we visited this special place because we have been working abroad and was excited to revisit a place that always been close to our hearts and being able to share it with very special friends just makes it more memorable.

saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.author: Inge de Villiers
saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.text: Amazing!! Best restaurant I've been to in a LONG time. Was quiet when we were there, causing me believe that it's a hidden gem. Definitely deserves more hype. The food is amazing and very cost efficient. I had the skaapstertjie starter and was stuffed to the brim. You can also bring your own wine.

saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.author: Prix
saddles-steak-ranch-bottelary.text: Food and drinks are average! Meat was very chewy and fatty but we just came here to eat cause there was nothing else around.

smiling-oven.author: marelize theron
smiling-oven.text: I bought a Red Velvet cake for my son's birthday and just added a few decorations according to the theme. Oh my word! It was the best cake I've ever eaten, in my opinion. Everyone at the party raved about it. Excellent value for money.

smiling-oven.author: Hanelise van der Hoven
smiling-oven.text: Dear Smiling Oven, Thank you so, so much for the absolutely beautiful cake. It was truly beyond my wildest expectations! Not only stunning to look at, but incredibly delicious as well. I am honestly so impressed by your work. Every detail was perfect, and it really made my daughters day extra special.

smiling-oven.author: Ingrid Olivier
smiling-oven.text: Had breakfast there on a Saturday morning, with home baked bread! Bought a few pies(Venison, Curry Lam, Bobotie) a few quiches and rotis. I had to buy their milktart, best in the world. Not forgetting their marshmallow tart. O and a whole baked bread, very heavy and very cheap. The staff was very helpfull.

the-hussar-grill-paarl.author: shaun marshall
the-hussar-grill-paarl.text: ⭐⭐⭐⭐ I recently visited The Hussar Grill Paarl and overall had a very enjoyable experience. The restaurant has a warm, cosy atmosphere that makes it a great spot for a relaxed dinner, especially if you’re looking for something a little more intimate and classic. The food was excellent, as expected from Hussar Grill.

the-hussar-grill-paarl.author: Taylor Hardenberg
the-hussar-grill-paarl.text: Food is always top notch. Service is great. The atmosphere is calm and beautiful views around you if you sit outside. Absolutely recommend their bitterballen for starters and the chicken Schnitzel as as a main with mash.

the-hussar-grill-paarl.author: Miguel Marquez
the-hussar-grill-paarl.text: Simply delicious. I saw heaven with the beef. It was so soft and tasty.

ya-ya-cafe.author: Aleksandr P.
ya-ya-cafe.text: A solid spot for a hearty breakfast in Sea Point, though it gets quite noisy and busy in the morning. The Good: The Food: Really high quality. I went for the Shawarma/gyro because I wanted a protein-heavy start to the day, and it didn't disappoint. The English Breakfast was also very good. The Drink: The banana milkshake is excellent!

ya-ya-cafe.author: Sherwy_B
ya-ya-cafe.text: Took my wife for our "5th anniversary breakfast" at Ya-ya cafe. The food did not disappoint and the service was decent. It was quite busy when we visited, atmosphere was buzzing with conversation and the sound of cutlery on plates as everyone enjoyed their delicious meals. Conclusion, Ya-ya Cafe is a good pick for Breakfast and Brunch.

ya-ya-cafe.author: Alex Ho
ya-ya-cafe.text: This café offers truly first-class breakfasts. The staff are very friendly, and every table is decorated with fresh wildflowers that not only brighten up the atmosphere but also give off a lovely fragrance. We had breakfast here on two mornings, and both times it was of a very high standard. They open as early as 7 a.m., which is great.

hennies-paarl.author: Suresh Rathod
hennies-paarl.text: Great experience at the bar! 🍻 The beer was excellent and the food was really tasty. The service was also very good — our waitress Gaynor was friendly and took great care of us. Everything from the drinks to the food was perfect. We are visiting from India 🇮🇳 and truly enjoyed the atmosphere.

hennies-paarl.author: Mariné Swanepoel
hennies-paarl.text: We had our daughter’s 3rd birthday party at Hennies Paarl and WOW. They really went all out. Great service, great food, and they do so much effort with kids birthday parties. Would recommend 100%.

hennies-paarl.author: Willem Van der Westhuyzen
hennies-paarl.text: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Jorja made our entire experience at Hennies exceptional. From the moment we sat down, she was warm, attentive, and genuinely welcoming. Her menu knowledge was spot-on, her recommendations were perfect, and she timed everything flawlessly without ever being intrusive.

noop.author: Kyla Phyfer
noop.text: An amazing lunch was had at Noop! The atmosphere, service, food, and drinks were all exceptional and cannot be faulted. We’d heard from a number of people that Noop delivers a consistently excellent experience, regardless of the day or time, and that was certainly our experience too.

noop.author: Laurie J
noop.text: One of the best restaurant in the area. We like it so much after visiting for our first dinner we came back. Great food that is not pretentious. Great service without being stuffy. You see many regulars coming back. The wow factor here is the amazing wine list maybe one of the best in South Africa.

noop.author: Adele Hall
noop.text: Easily one of the best dining experiences I’ve had in the area. Their daily featured dishes alone are worth the visit. Think ultra-fresh local oysters, beautifully prepared abalone risotto, delicate tartare, and impeccably cooked fresh fish. Everything feels seasonal, thoughtful, and rooted in quality ingredients.

terbodore-caf-franschhoek.author: Gaye Moonieya
terbodore-caf-franschhoek.text: I had avo on sourdough toast with caramelized nuts, feta and beetroot. Delicious and filling. Great coffee. Service a little inconsistent though but it was a wet, miserable day and we would probably have all preferred being home under the covers! I will definitely go again if I'm in Franschhoek. Its was my second visit.

terbodore-caf-franschhoek.author: Aimee
terbodore-caf-franschhoek.text: Lovely cafe - outdoor seating under the trees as lovely. Food tasty, coffee great and the staff were super friendly

terbodore-caf-franschhoek.author: Paul Custer
terbodore-caf-franschhoek.text: Breakfast so good, first thing I do after finishing is to write this. Amazing pistachio cold cream coffee, Mexican chicken & waffles. So so so good, amidst a very pleasing din and wonderful service.

la-petite-colombe.author: Rake Justown
la-petite-colombe.text: a genuinely exceptional restaurant - one of the best in the world. the location, setting and service were all incredible. every single dish and wine selected was delicious, and the inventive tasting menu worked perfectly as a collective. a huge thanks to the entire team for making it such a special occasion.

la-petite-colombe.author: Andrew Macleod
la-petite-colombe.text: I love the entire experience of le Petite Colombe. Atmosphere, staff , attention to detail, food and flavours OMG, I had got the date wrong ( my fault entirely) and the staff at the restaurant were completely accomodating despite the capacity being almost full.

la-petite-colombe.author: Kendall Bajek
la-petite-colombe.text: Finally a Michelin dining experience that truly lives up to the hype!! I can be very skeptical of a Michelin reservation because sometimes I leave feeling inspired by the service, the atmosphere, the experience, but underwhelmed by the actual quality and quantity of the food. Not at Petite Colombe though...

reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.author: Ethan
reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.text: This was by far my finest dining experience in South Africa. It began with some lovely homemade bread, paired with local wine. For mains, I had the line fish, which was similar to white salmon, served with a beautiful sauce and green vegetables.

reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.author: John Barrett
reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.text: Pose was our server. So sweet and very helpful. We both had the French onion soup which was delicious. I had the Pork Belly which was also amazing. I would recommend this place to anyone who is in the area.

reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.author: Angela Jones
reubens-restaurant-bar-franschhoek.text: It was our last night in Franschoek and so we decided to treat ourselves by dining at Reuben’s. We are glad that we had booked as I think this helps you to secure a good table, plus it got busy! The service is excellent (thank you Wilson) and as we had the table all night we could take time relaxing between courses.

oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.author: DJJ
oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.text: We’ve visited Oceans 8 many times, and every experience has been outstanding, from the exceptional food to the attentive service. Renowned for their sushi 🍣, the quality is consistently top-notch.

oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.author: DEONNE LUBBE
oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.text: The best sushi I have had in a while, the setting is so beautiful, like a beautiful surprise when walking through their doors. The serving staff and manager were very friendly and the service was pronto. 100% would recommend this restaurant!

oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.author: Local reviewer
oceans-8-seafood-sushi-somerset-west.text: I recently had the pleasure of dining at Oceans 8 Seafood and Sushi, and the experience was truly outstanding. Our server demonstrated exceptional patience and attentiveness, ensuring our needs were consistently met with thoughtful and unobtrusive check-ins throughout the evening. The culinary offerings were nothing short of phenomenal.

sanook-somerset-cape-town.author: Gerardt Pierre Viljoen
sanook-somerset-cape-town.text: Great service, we were lucky to get a table without a reservation. It is recommended that you make a reservation. The pizza was super nice and filling. They also have a wonderful wine selection. Waiters were friendly and knew the menu well to make good recommendation. Coffee was good. Will definitely come back to check consistency

sanook-somerset-cape-town.author: Kevin Barnes
sanook-somerset-cape-town.text: Shenook delivers a really enjoyable dining experience. The menu may be plain in presentation, but it’s thoughtfully put together, reasonably priced, and packed with very tasty options. Service is good and efficient, making it an easy place to return to for a consistently satisfying meal

sanook-somerset-cape-town.author: Natascha VJ
sanook-somerset-cape-town.text: We read the raving reviews about the Buddha Bowls, so went for it : 1 chicken truffle and 1 sticky pork, both equally wonderful. The Mocktails were delicious and so was the coffee and salted caramel cheesecake. Great service. Relax atmosphere. Most certainly a place to come back to.

clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.author: Gail Sias
clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.text: Wow wow wow ,what an awesome experience. Greeted with a smile and escorted to our seating. It was my very first time and definately not the last. My adventure with the painting was great as I am not an art person but I think I found my passion😅cos I ended up painting 2 items.

clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.author: JC V
clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.text: The Clay Café in Paarl is a wonderful spot for a relaxed and creative outing. They offer a variety of seating options, both indoors and outdoors, making it comfortable no matter the weather. There is a great selection of items to choose from for painting, so there’s something for everyone.

clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.author: Amanda Boucher
clay-cafe-paarl-pottery-caf-kid-friendly.text: What a great venue. Be sure to enjoy a great time with friends. Wheter you need some "me" and need to get that perfect dinner set. Or if you just want to spoil someone special with food and creativety. And even if you are no artist at all. The friendly staff will help you anytime with everything you need.

babel-at-babylonstoren.author: Wayne Dean
babel-at-babylonstoren.text: Great food, bit over priced, but the view is breath taking. Service was friendly and tentive. Very nice that we received seasonal fruit bag and my wife a bouquet of proteas just because. Pleasant surprise. Great day and lovely season gardens to stroll through.

babel-at-babylonstoren.author: Clem Weld Forester
babel-at-babylonstoren.text: Incredible setting, beautiful restaurant - even the napkins and cutlery were of high quality. Our waitress was lovely and very knowledgable about the wine and menu. Loved th bread and butter with the botanical oils.

babel-at-babylonstoren.author: Tobias R.
babel-at-babylonstoren.text: Absolutely exceptional. The food was fantastic, the service friendly, fast and accommodating, the atmosphere is nice. They have a set menu (2 or 3 course), with multiple options for each course. Each dish was flavorful, not overpowering, and offered multiple textures. Presentation was very appealing.

stoep.author: Atomic-Chicken
stoep.text: What a fantastic evening at Stoep Restaurant! From the moment we arrived, we fell in love with the beautiful setting. The restaurant is wonderfully decorated and feels like you're sitting in the middle of a lush garden, surrounded by greenery and a warm, earthy atmosphere.

stoep.author: J C
stoep.text: I recently visited Stoep in Paarl, and it turned into one of the highlights of my trip. The setting is beautiful, surrounded by vineyards and the charming atmosphere of the Winery right next door.

stoep.author: Chris de Brouwer
stoep.text: The Sunday roast was excellent with wonderful beef, chicken, roast veggies and more! Service was very good. Atmosphere was somewhat disrupted by one very noisy patron using vulgar language all the time and clearly inebriated. Otherwise it's a beautiful place, amazing view, good food and attentive personnel.

greenhouse-restaurant.author: A S
greenhouse-restaurant.text: Great restaurant under the trees, nestled inside their beautiful vegetable garden. Short and sweet menu with breakfast, salads and surprisingly large sandwiches. I was very impressed with their tasty salad which had a mix of leaves and fruits from the garden.

greenhouse-restaurant.author: Mohammed Altamimi T
greenhouse-restaurant.text: Tried this restaurant in this an amazing farm.the food is so fresh but the issue is the menu is limited, which leads to unsatisfactory experience. The atmosphere is amazing with all the green & trees around you. But the staff were not up to standard and a bit unfriendly. We tried the salad, which was amazing.

greenhouse-restaurant.author: Candice Shari Meth
greenhouse-restaurant.text: This is by far one of the absolute best vineyards I have ever experienced. There is a feeling of major nostalgia, excitement, and a "Kid like" feeling of being able to walk through the stunning gardens and pick fruit off the trees. Sitting at the Greenhouse, the air is fresh, clean with a buzz of joy and excitement in the air.

bootlegger-somerset-west.author: Estelle Hester
bootlegger-somerset-west.text: 3 stars overall. 5 stars for the cappuccino - it is the best I've ever had. It was hot until the last drop and the foam was exceptional. But.... Something is amiss in the kitchen and maybe the balance of staff. I noticed so many waitrons, I was greeted with friendliness by a barista who promptly brought a menu and took my order.

bootlegger-somerset-west.author: Laura-Lee Gillion
bootlegger-somerset-west.text: I always found the atmosphere at this Bootleggers to be welcoming. I would like to thank the waiter Stephan for the lovely service. He was very attentive, helpful, kind and on it!

bootlegger-somerset-west.author: Zolani Gqomo
bootlegger-somerset-west.text: I went to Bootleggers in Somerset Mall yesterday ,specifically to try their burger, and honestly, it exceeded my expectations.Let’s start with the patty. It was cooked exactly how I asked ,juicy on the inside, with a nice char on the outside. You could tell it was fresh beef, not frozen, because the flavor was rich and clean.

bluebird-caf.author: Gerardt Pierre Viljoen
bluebird-caf.text: Stopped here for a bite on our way home. The food was very nice. My wife had a wrap that was good and my daughter had the butternut salad which was very nice. The service was little slow and less friendly than we are used to in this area. Very nice views and setting. May try them again to get a better idea.

bluebird-caf.author: Nick Fisher
bluebird-caf.text: Food looks ok but isnt. Coffee super bad. The waiter is good homie tho.

bluebird-caf.author: Adrian Maasch
bluebird-caf.text: Great brunch and breakfast spot. Great coffees and all round aesthetic. Blue bird breakfast put together well, eggs florentine and omega breakfast also great choices. Kids area outside as well which is handy for the young ones.

bootlegger-strand.author: Chane Smith
bootlegger-strand.text: Had a lovely experience. Our waiter Raymond was very welcoming and friendly and gave us exceptional service. We had the Bootbun and the Flapjacks, both were so good. I highly recommend the Bootbun, tastes amazing. The Flapjacks were fluffy and thick. Highly recommend a visit here.

bootlegger-strand.author: Diane Knott
bootlegger-strand.text: We love visiting the store. Staff are professional and well trained, but mostly, they get on well with each other, which makes for a most enjoyable experience! Coffee is the best and food excellent and well presented.

bootlegger-strand.author: C C
bootlegger-strand.text: A true hidden gem by the ocean! Breathtaking view, super friendly staff, and a menu that has something for every taste. The coffee is rich, smooth, and clearly top quality. Perfect spot to relax, sip, and enjoy the waves. Will definitely be coming back!

la-cotte-farm.author: Jenna Scinta
la-cotte-farm.text: This is a beautiful property located right in town. We had no issue going back and forth either on foot or the rented bikes. We stayed in the Forrest cottages and the amount of room and layout was wonderful. I visited with a girlfriend and we each had our own private space which is hard to find on a trip and is a great value.

la-cotte-farm.author: Wendy Hamp
la-cotte-farm.text: We stayed at La Cotte for two nights as part of an anniversary trip to Southern Africa. We arrived on a cold, wet and windy day and were quickly ushered to the safety of our beautiful room with stunning views of the surrounding mountains.

la-cotte-farm.author: devilliers beukes
la-cotte-farm.text: This was truly the best experience I've had in a very long time. Just what my mind and body needed. The gardens upon gardens and interior of the buildings are well planned and set. The staff was exceptionally friendly and helpful everywhere.

salmon-brine.author: Jozi Girl
salmon-brine.text: Lovely restaurant. Spacious with indoor and outdoor seating. Service is tops. Calamari was cooked to perfection however it lacked flavour. The Korean chicken bao buns was loaded with a mayo ish sauce which was not to my liking. Ordered to prawn curry and could eat it as it was extremely salty and lacked a curry flavour.

salmon-brine.author: Dillon Martin
salmon-brine.text: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolutely unforgettable experience We recently hosted my wife’s 30th birthday celebration at Salmon & Brine on Vendôme Farm, and it was nothing short of perfect. From the moment we started planning, Sascha went above and beyond to ensure every detail was thoughtfully taken care of.

salmon-brine.author: Mangaliso
salmon-brine.text: Salmon & Brine never misses. Fresh, beautifully prepared seafood, warm service, and a cosy atmosphere that makes every meal feel special. The flavours are clean, honest, and absolutely delicious. A must-visit in Paarl.

lounah-caf.author: Marion yi
lounah-caf.text: I went to Lounah Cafe with my daughter and I tasted the food. Wow amazing 😮 👏 There I decided to have my birthday celebration and took my family for breakfast. They were not disappointed. Luv the food and the ambiance. Space could be a little bit bigger but I understand the concept.

lounah-caf.author: Shirley Ross
lounah-caf.text: My first time here and I was really very impressed with the attention to detail in decor with all the various seating areas. The food and my cuppacino was delicious. The best part is the pricing! What a gem to find good food at reasonable, affordable pricing. I will certainly be back!

lounah-caf.author: Joe Arnold
lounah-caf.text: I came from the UK, this place is beautiful! Posh coffee and cake! Jade our server was delightful, happy, friendly and kind. Thank you Jade!

giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.author: Sam Adams
giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.text: Had a lovely experience at Giovanni's at JC Le Roux. The food was delicious and beautifully presented, the drinks were refreshing, and the atmosphere was relaxed and elegant. A perfect spot for a date or a leisurely lunch with beautiful views. Definitely worth a visit!

giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.author: Abigail Sharolene Meyer
giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.text: My partner (Franklin) booked this experience for my birthday, and it started off wonderfully. We did the wine pairing (chocolate and biltong), which was absolutely amazing—10/10. Abby and the other gentleman assisting us were fantastic, and their service alone deserves 5 stars. We enjoyed it so much that we even purchased two bottles.

giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.author: Alrich Thomas
giovannis-restaurant-at-the-house-of-j-c.text: Beautiful setup with beautiful views. The staff were amazing, the food, from starters to mains (didn't have any space left for dessert), were world-class! Reasonably priced, high quality food options. A must visit!

pontac-manor-hotel-restaurant.author: Abigail Erasmus
pontac-manor-hotel-restaurant.text: Excellent service, with very kind staff. Got ready for my wedding and could take nice pictures in the room and garden. The breakfast was also good. Would recommend.

pontac-manor-hotel-restaurant.author: Rewex 4SWA
